hero.description: 通過認證的環保包裝解決方案實現業務轉型，在減少環境影響的同時創造卓越的商業價值。

about.title: 引領可持續包裝革命
about.p1: Achieve Pack® 是 pouch.eco 的母公司，於 2011 年在香港成立。我們專注於為尋求轉向環保包裝的企業提供一站式解決方案，而不犧牲品質或成本效益。
about.p2: 我們的使命是讓各種規模的企業都能獲得可持續包裝，提供經過認證的可堆肥材料、可回收選項和生物基解決方案，在顯著減少環境影響的同時提供卓越的商業價值。

team.title: 認識我們的團隊
team.description: 我們專業的包裝團隊致力於為您的業務找到完美的可持續解決方案。

faq.title: 常見問題
faq.description: 獲取有關我們可持續包裝解決方案、認證、生產時間和品質標準的詳細解答。

aiHint.text: 如果您正在使用 Gemini 或 AI 搜索，可以詢問：
aiHint.q1: 如何驗證可堆肥咖啡袋供應商是否真正獲得認證？
aiHint.q2: 切換到可回收單材質PE袋前應檢查哪些事項？

certs.q: 你們的包裝材料有哪些認證？
certs.a: 我們的可堆肥包裝材料已獲得 EN13432（歐洲標準）和 ASTM D6400（美國標準）認證，確保在商業堆肥設施中正確分解。可回收選項包括 GRS（全球回收標準）認證的 PCR（消費後回收）材料。我們還擁有錨對美國市場的 BPI 認證。您可以向 TÜV Austria、DIN CERTCO 或 BPI 等發證機構驗證我們的認證編號。

moq.q: 定制袋的最低訂購量是多少？
moq.a: 對於樣品訂單和小批量測試，我們的最低起訂量僅需 100-1,000 件，取決於袋型和定制程度。這非常適合初創企業、DTC 品牌和測試新產品的企業。大規模生產訂單建議 5,000 件以上以獲得更佳的單位成本。

time.q: 從設計稿批准到交付需要多長時間？
time.a: 我們的生產時間分為兩個階段：樣品生產從設計稿批准後需要 2-3 週，大規模生產從樣品批准後需要 6-8 週。空運至美國約 7-10 天，海運約 25-35 天。歐盟和英國的交付時間類似。緊急訂單可提供 4 天快速打樣服務。

cost.q: 與傳統塑膠相比，環保材料是否具有成本效益？
cost.a: 雖然環保材料的材料成本可能比傳統塑膠高 10-20%，但總體擁有成本通常相等或更低，因為：重量輕 70% 可節省 15-22% 運輸成本；袋裝平放運輸可減少 70% 倉庫空間；可獲得可持續發展激勵或認證；高端定位允許更高零售價。

barrier.q: 針對咖啡、零食、寵物零食和粉末有哪些阻隔選項？
barrier.a: 我們提供與產品需求匹配的阻隔方案：低阻隔（透明或牛皮紙）適合保質期 3-6 個月的乾貨；中阻隔（鎡射或 EVOH 層）適合 6-12 個月的零食和咖啡；高阻隔（鋁箔層）適合 12-18 個月保護；最大阻隔（鋁箔+多層）適合 18-24 個月保質期。

design.q: 你們能協助設計稿和包裝設計嗎？
design.a: 是的，我們在每個階段提供全面的設計支援：AI、PDF 或 PSD 格式的刀模線範本；包括數位模擬圖和實體印刷樣品的印刷校樣；支援數位印刷（無限色彩）和凹版印刷（最多 10 色 Pantone）。我們的團隊還提供唔光、亮光、觸感塗層、局部 UV、金屬油墨和壓紋等表面處理建議。

colorConsistency.q: 如何確保複購時印刷顏色和袋子品質一致？
colorConsistency.a: 顏色一致性對品牌識別至關重要，我們保持嚴格的品質控制流程：我們保留每次生產的數位顏色參考檔和實體留樣。凹版印刷使用 Pantone 色彩匹配並記錄色號。每次複購前，我們會與之前的樣品進行比對並提供生產前校樣。我們的 QC 團隊在多個階段進行檢查，並使用校準的分光光度計測量色差，確保在可接受的 Delta E 容差範圍內。

defects.q: 如何控制拉鏈故障、密封問題或分層等缺陷？
defects.a: 品質控制貫穿整個生產流程：原材料驗收時檢查厚度、透明度和阻隔性能。生產過程中測試熱封強度、拉鏈開合次數和爆裂壓力。成品袋按 AQL 標準進行抽樣檢驗。弱密封、拉鏈偏移或分層等常見缺陷在發貨前就會被發現。我們提供明確的退換政策和 QC 報告。

testReports.q: 能否提供食品接觸安全和保質期性能的測試報告？
testReports.a: 是的，我們提供全面的文件：確認材料符合 FDA（美國）、EU 10/2011（歐洲）等食品級要求的安全證書；遷移測試報告；每種材料結構的 OTR（氧氣透過率）和 WVTR（水蒸氣透過率）數據；以及 EN13432、ASTM D6400 和家庭可堆肥標準的可堆肥性證書。所有文件均提供 PDF 格式。

verifyCertification.q: 如何驗證環保包裝供應商是否真正獲得認證？
verifyCertification.a: 在評估任何環保包裝供應商時，應檢查：要求提供實際認證編號，而不僅僅是標誌。真正的 EN13432 或 ASTM D6400 證書包含可與發證機構（TÜV Austria、DIN CERTCO、BPI）核實的證書編號。要求來自認可實驗室的測試報告。驗證證書是否適用於您訂購的確切材料。在 Achieve Pack，我們提前提供所有認證文件並歡迎驗證請求。

switching.q: 切換到可回收單材質PE或PP袋前應檢查哪些事項？
switching.a: 切換到可回收單材質袋前，請考慮：阻隔性能 - 單材質PE和PP通常提供比多層結構更低的阻隔，確認它們滿足產品保質期要求。回收基礎設施 - 確認您的目標市場有接受軟包裝的回收流。消費者溝通 - 仔細規劃包裝上的回收說明，因為各地區指南不同。法規聲明 - 確保任何「可回收」聲明符合 FTC 綠色指南或同等法規。我們幫助客戶導航這些考量。

leadTime.title: 生產交期

artwork.title: 設計稿要求
artwork.desc: 可印刷檔案（AI、PDF、EPS），300 DPI，CMYK 色彩模式，3mm 出血。客戶需對設計稿錯誤負責。

confirmation.title: 訂單確認
confirmation.desc: 生產前需支付訂金或全額付款並確認設計稿。

times.title: 運輸時間
times.desc: 空運：20 天 | 海運：60 天。視承運商可用性和海關情況而定。

costs.title: 費用與條款
costs.desc: 深圳市內免費配送。深圳以外由客戶承擔費用。FOB 香港條款。

inspection.title: 檢驗
inspection.desc: 客戶必須在 7 天內檢查貨物並以書面形式報告問題。未報告視為接受貨物。

thirdParty.title: 第三方物流免責聲明
thirdParty.desc: 所有運輸服務均由第三方物流提供商提供。ACHIEVE PACK 對運輸過程中的延誤、海關扣留、包裹遺失或任何超出我們控制範圍的情況概不負責。

payment.title: 付款條款
payment.desc: 除非另有說明，否則淨 15 天付款。未付款訂單可能被取消/暫停。定製訂單生產開始後不退款。生產前取消需支付 10% 取消費。

size.title: 尺寸容差
size.desc: 袋子尺寸完全可定製，容差通常為 ±2mm 至 ±4mm。標準容差：厚度 ±0.05mm，尺寸 ±3mm，套印 ±1mm，沖孔 ±3mm。

fit.title: 適用性
fit.desc: 客戶必須確認尺寸相容性。ACHIEVE PACK 不對適配問題負責。建議訂購尺寸樣品包進行測試。

ip.title: 知識產權
ip.desc1: 客戶保證設計稿不侵犯知識產權。客戶提供資質證書和授權書。客戶對所有侵權索賠負責，並須賠償 ACHIEVE PACK 的損失。
ip.desc2: 除非另有說明，ACHIEVE PACK 可將設計用於作品集/營銷。

color.title: 顏色準確度
color.sample: 可按成本提供樣品確認。

quality.title: 質量標準

overview.title: 什麼是可堆肥包裝？
overview.intro: 可堆肥包裝旨在在堆肥環境中分解為天然元素，不留有毒殘留物。與持續數百年的傳統塑料不同，認證可堆肥材料在90-180天內在商業堆肥設施中分解。
overview.keyFacts: 可堆肥包裝的主要事實：
overview.fact1: 在90-180天內在商業堆肥中分解
overview.fact2: 由可再生植物基材料製成（PLA、纖維素）
overview.fact3: 不留下微塑料或有毒殘留物
overview.fact4: 符合國際標準認證（EN 13432、ASTM D6400）
overview.marketInfo: 根據歐洲生物塑料協會，全球可堆肥包裝市場預計到2030年將達到237億美元，年複合增長率17.4%，品牌正在從傳統塑料轉型。

disposal.intro: 了解正確的處理方式是實現環境效益的關鍵：
disposal.commercialVsHome: 商業堆肥 vs 家庭堆肥
disposal.commercialVsHomeDesc: 商業堆肥設施保持55-60°C的溫度，加速分解。大多數認證可堆肥包裝需要這些條件。家庭堆肥在較低溫度下運作，可能需要6-12個月完全分解。
disposal.instruction1: 移除任何不可堆肥的元件（如果拉鏈不可堆肥，可能需要剪掉）
disposal.instruction2: 放入商業堆肥桶（請查詢當地是否有此服務）
disposal.instruction3: 不要放入普通回收桶 - 可堆肥物可能汙染回收流
disposal.instruction4: 如果沒有商業堆肥服務，放入普通垃圾（分解速度仍比傳統塑料快）

faq.q1: 可堆肥和可生物降解有什麼區別？
faq.a1: 可堆肥材料在堆肥條件下於特定時間內完全分解為天然元素，並有認證證明（EN 13432、ASTM D6400）。'可生物降解'是一個更廣泛、未受監管的術語 - 技術上任何東西最終都會生物降解，包括傳統塑料需要幾百年。請始終尋找認證可堆肥，而不僅仅是可生物降解的聲明。
faq.q2: 可堆肥包裝會在填埋場分解嗎？
faq.a2: 可堆肥包裝需要氧氣和微生物才能有效分解。填埋場是無氧環境，所以分解非常緩慢。但可堆肥材料仍會比傳統塑料分解得更快，且不會留下微塑料殘留物。
faq.q3: 我可以在家堆肥認證可堆肥包裝嗎？
faq.a3: 大多數認證可堆肥包裝是為商業/工業堆肥（55-60°C）設計的。部分材料可家庭堆肥（符合AS 5810或OK Home標準）。我們可以建議哪種材料適合您的需求。
faq.q4: 可堆肥包裝食品安全嗎？
faq.a4: 是的，我們所有可堆肥材料都符合FDA 21 CFR和歐盟10/2011法規的食品接觸認證。PLA和纖維素基材料源自天然，安全用於直接食品接觸。
faq.q5: 可堆肥包裝與普通塑料相比成本如何？
faq.a5: 可堆肥材料通常比傳統塑料貴15-30%。但隨著生產規模擴大和需求增長，價格差距正在縮小。許多品牌認為可持續性優勢和行銷價值讓這筆溢價物有所值。

faq.q1: What's the difference between home and industrial compostable?
faq.a1: Home compostable packaging breaks down in backyard compost bins at ambient temperatures (20-30°C). Industrial compostable requires commercial facilities with controlled high temperatures (58°C+). Home compostable is more accessible to consumers but typically has lower barrier properties.
faq.q2: How long does home composting take?
faq.a2: Our home compostable pouches typically break down in 6-12 months in an active backyard compost. Factors affecting speed include temperature, moisture, turning frequency, and the existing microbial activity in your compost.
faq.q3: Can I put home compostable packaging in my green bin?
faq.a3: It depends on your local council's guidelines. Many municipal green bin programs only accept industrial compostable materials. Home compostable items are designed for backyard composting. Check with your local waste authority.
faq.q4: Is home compostable packaging suitable for all products?
faq.a4: Home compostable materials typically have low-medium barrier properties, making them best for dry goods with 3-6 month shelf life. For products requiring high barrier (coffee, supplements), we recommend industrial compostable or recyclable options.

faq.q1: How do consumers dispose of industrial compostable packaging?
faq.a1: Industrial compostable packaging should go in commercial composting bins (often marked with 'compostable' or green/brown bins) where available. Many cities now have organic waste collection that goes to composting facilities. Check your local guidelines.
faq.q2: Will industrial compostable packaging break down in landfill?
faq.a2: No. Landfills lack the oxygen, moisture, and microbial activity needed for composting. Industrial compostable packaging is designed for aerobic composting conditions. If your area lacks composting infrastructure, recyclable packaging may be more appropriate.
faq.q3: Is industrial compostable more or less expensive than home compostable?
faq.a3: Industrial compostable materials are generally 10-20% less expensive than home compostable options because the certification requirements are less stringent and material options are broader. However, both are more expensive than conventional plastics.
faq.q4: Can I use industrial compostable for export to different countries?
faq.a4: EN 13432 certification is recognized in the EU, UK, and many other markets. ASTM D6400 is the standard for North America. For Australia, look for AS 4736. We can help you select the right certification for your target markets.

recyclableMonoPE.title: Recyclable Mono-PE Packaging | 100% PE Flexible Pouches
recyclableMonoPE.heroSubtitle: Single-material polyethylene pouches that can be recycled in standard PE recycling streams. The practical sustainable choice.
recyclableMonoPE.introSummary: Mono-PE packaging uses single-material polyethylene construction, making it compatible with PE recycling programs. Unlike multi-material laminates, mono-PE pouches can be recycled through store drop-off and growing curbside programs while maintaining good barrier properties.

howItWorks.title: How Mono-PE Achieves Barrier
howItWorks.intro: Traditional pouches use different materials (PET, nylon, aluminum) for barrier. Mono-PE achieves this with PE-only solutions:

evoh.title: EVOH Barrier Layer
evoh.desc: Thin EVOH layer sandwiched between PE. Provides excellent oxygen barrier while remaining recyclable in PE stream (EVOH content <5%).

pePe.title: PE-PE Structures
pePe.desc: Different PE types (HDPE, MDPE, LDPE) combined for optimal stiffness, seal, and barrier without other materials.

coatings.title: Barrier Coatings
coatings.desc: SiOx or AlOx coatings on PE provide metallized-like barrier while maintaining recyclability.

oriented.title: Oriented PE
oriented.desc: Machine direction oriented PE (MDOPE) provides improved stiffness and printability typically achieved with PET.

applications.intro: Mono-PE packaging works well for many products:

options: Store drop-off programs – Many major retailers accept PE flexible packaging
Curbside recycling – Growing number of municipalities accept flexible PE
Terracycle programs – Specialty recycling for brands
recycling.note: Note: Recycling infrastructure varies by region. We recommend checking local guidelines and communicating proper disposal instructions on packaging.

faq.q1: Is mono-PE truly recyclable?
faq.a1: Yes, mono-PE pouches are recyclable in polyethylene recycling streams. They are accepted at store drop-off points (like those at major retailers) and some curbside programs. Always check local recycling guidelines.
faq.q2: What is the barrier level of mono-PE?
faq.a2: Mono-PE offers medium barrier properties suitable for many dry goods. For products requiring higher barrier, we use EVOH-coated PE which maintains recyclability while improving oxygen barrier. MVTR typically 1-3 g/m²/24hr, OTR 10-30 cc/m²/24hr for standard PE.
faq.q3: How does mono-PE compare in cost?
faq.a3: Mono-PE pouches typically cost 5-15% more than equivalent multi-material structures due to specialized materials needed for barrier. However, the sustainability benefit often justifies the premium for eco-conscious brands.
faq.q4: Can mono-PE pouches be printed?
faq.a4: Yes, mono-PE pouches can achieve high-quality printing with up to 10 colors. We use specialized inks and coatings designed for PE surfaces. Surface treatment ensures excellent ink adhesion.

overview.title: What is Mono-PP Packaging?
overview.intro: Mono-PP (mono-material polypropylene) packaging is made entirely from polypropylene, enabling recycling in PP recycling streams. PP offers higher heat resistance and better clarity than PE, making it ideal for specific applications.
benefits: Recyclable in PP stream (recycling code #5)
Higher heat resistance than PE (up to 120°C)
Better clarity and gloss
Good stiffness and barrier properties
Hot-fill and microwave capable

hotFill.title: 耐高溫灌裝與微波加熱：單材質 PP 對食品初創品牌的超強優勢
hotFill.intro: 如果您是推出高溫灌裝醬汁、高檔湯品、果泥或微波即食餐的食品初創品牌，傳統塑料袋會是個巨大障礙。暴露於高溫時，它們易於熔化、變形或釋放化學物質。傳統多層複合膜雖耐高溫，但完全無法回收——最終只能直接進入垃圾填埋場。
hotFill.cardDesc: 我們革命性的單一材質聚丙烯（Mono-PP）袋子可以輕鬆承受高達 130°C 的高溫灌裝，並且完全適用於微波爐。由於它們由單一材料（100% PP）製成，因此可直接進入標準的 #5 PP 回收流。現在您可以熱灌裝您的高檔醬料，維持產品完美的新鮮度，同時讓您的品牌實現 100% 循環。
hotFill.bulletsTitle: 單材質 PP 性能優勢：
hotFill.bullet1: 高溫灌裝安全 (最高 130°C)：可直接灌裝高溫湯品、果泥或醬汁，無包裝變形或化學物質遷移風險。
hotFill.bullet2: 微波加熱便利性：非常適合即熱穀物、米飯和冷凍餐食，具備真正的袋內蒸汽加熱潛力。
hotFill.bullet3: 100% 可回收：完美契合 #5 塑料回收計劃，避免多層塑料進入填埋場的命運。

clarity.title: 玻璃般清晰的展示窗口與強大防潮阻隔
clarity.intro: 消費者通常用眼睛購物。如果您銷售高端食材、色彩豐富的超級食品、客製化香料或有機寵物食品，您一定希望您的產品能完美展示。傳統的 PE 包裝袋天然帶有些許霧感，容易使食品的鮮豔色彩顯得暗淡。
clarity.cardTitle: 水晶般清晰的展示窗口與挺拔外觀
clarity.cardDesc: 單材質 PP 提供優異的高光澤度和玻璃般的光學透明度。它賦予您的包裝高端質感，同時提供高度剛性的結構。這種硬度能確保您的立式袋在貨架和運輸箱中保持挺立，不易起皺或軟塌。
clarity.bullet1: 優異的防潮與防氣體阻隔：保持高密封性，保質期可達 12 至 18 個月，有效阻隔濕氣以維持新鮮度。
clarity.bullet2: 耐油與耐脂肪：非常適合油性零食、寵物食品、生酮烘焙粉或容易使普通薄膜老化的多脂食品。
clarity.bullet3: 高度剛性：外觀更顯高端且立體，比一般軟塌的 PE 袋具備更出色的貨架陳列效果。

lowMoq.title: DTC 品牌的靈活性：客製化印刷 500 個起訂
lowMoq.intro: 許多工業包裝供應商強制品牌起訂 10,000 個以上的袋子。如果您正在測試新業務，或者研發了三種口味，這意味著要冒著極大的資金風險在一款未經市場驗證的包裝上。
lowMoq.cardTitle: 無需版費 · 靈活拼版多款設計
lowMoq.cardDesc: 在 Pouch.eco，我們專注於協助初創品牌靈活起步。我們印刷客製化單材質 PP 袋僅需 500 個起。通過先進的數位印刷，我們完全免除了昂貴的銅版版費。您可以輕鬆地在多個產品口味之間分配起訂量，或以極低的資金風險測試季節性限定款。
lowMoq.adviceDesc: 「當您進行市場測試時，可以先訂購一小批數位印刷的客製化單材質 PP 立式袋以驗證市場契合度。如果您想將起步成本控制得更低，可以大批量採購無印刷空白袋，然後使用手工植物性印章在袋上自行蓋印。」

personalization.title: 極簡與環保的融合：氣味區分與自定義標籤
personalization.intro: 不論您正在設計一個極簡復古的品牌，還是包裝健康天然的保養品，單材質 PP 都是完美選擇。它高度剛性的結構和高亮表面，非常適合呈現現代大膽的數位印刷，或極簡的白墨打底印刷。
personalization.card1Desc: 銷售沐浴鹽、清潔補充包或天然花草茶？使用簡潔、大膽的排版色帶區分不同气味。單材質 PP 的挺度能使圖案和文字保持完美平整且易於閱讀。
personalization.card2Title: 🏷️ 客製化標籤與貼紙貼附
personalization.card2Desc: 您也可以採購無印刷的現貨袋，並貼上客製化的植物基可堆肥標籤。這是實驗性 DTC 初創品牌極低成本、且最靈活的包裝解決方案。

faq.q1: Is mono-PP recyclable everywhere?
faq.a1: PP recycling (#5) is less widely available than PE recycling. However, PP recycling infrastructure is growing. Many store drop-off programs and an increasing number of curbside programs accept PP. Always check local guidelines.
faq.q2: Can mono-PP pouches be microwaved?
faq.a2: Yes, mono-PP pouches can be safely microwaved as PP is heat-resistant up to 120°C. This makes them ideal for ready meals and microwaveable products. The pouch must not contain any metallization.
faq.q3: What barrier properties does mono-PP offer?
faq.a3: Standard mono-PP has moderate barrier properties. For improved oxygen barrier, we use PP with EVOH barrier layer (keeping PP content >95% for recyclability) or barrier coatings.
faq.q4: How does mono-PP compare in cost to mono-PE?
faq.a4: Mono-PP is generally 5-10% more expensive than mono-PE due to material costs. However, the heat resistance and clarity benefits justify this for appropriate applications.

bioPE.title: Bio-PE Packaging | Sugarcane-Based Sustainable Pouches
bioPE.heroSubtitle: Polyethylene made from renewable sugarcane. Same performance, lower carbon footprint, fully recyclable.
bioPE.introSummary: Bio-PE is polyethylene made from renewable sugarcane instead of fossil fuels. It offers identical performance to conventional PE while capturing carbon during production. Bio-PE is fully recyclable in standard PE streams and certified by Braskem's I'm green™ program.
bioPE.ctaDescription: Request a free sample and quote for plant-based packaging.

overview.title: 什麼是 Bio-PE？
overview.intro: Bio-PE (生物基聚乙烯) 在化學結構上與傳統 PE 完全一致，但它使用可再生的甘蔗乙醇代替化石石油作為原料。在降低碳足跡的同時，提供了與常規 PE 相同的包裝強度和防護性能。
benefits: 由可再生甘蔗製成 (生物基含量高達 95%)
原料生產階段具備負碳排效應 (Carbon Negative)
提供與常規 PE 完全一致的物性與阻隔表現
完全融入現有的 PE 塑料回收體系
通過 Braskem 官方 I'm green™ 認證

logoSection.title: I'm Green™ 甘蔗基聚乙烯認證
logoSection.desc: 我們所採用的 Bio-PE 均採購自 Braskem 生產的 I'm Green™ 甘蔗基聚乙烯。此標誌可印製在您的包裝袋上，向消費者傳遞明確的綠色永續理念。
logoSection.artworkUsage: 圖案使用規範：使用我們 Bio-PE 材料的品牌，在通過物料來源核實後，即可獲授權在包裝上印製 I'm Green 標誌。

howItWorks.title: Bio-PE 是如何製造的
howItWorks.step1Desc: 甘蔗在生長過程中通過光合作用大量吸收大氣中的 CO2
howItWorks.step2Desc: 甘蔗經過榨汁與發酵，轉化為生物乙醇
howItWorks.step3Desc: 生物乙醇經脫水處理，轉化為綠色乙烯 (Bio-Ethylene)
howItWorks.step4Desc: 綠色乙烯聚合為綠色聚乙烯 (Bio-PE)，分子式與化石 PE 完全相同

carbon.title: 碳排放優勢
items: Bio-PE：每生產 1 kg 的 Bio-PE，可淨吸收並鎖定約 3.09 kg CO2
傳統石油基 PE：每生產 1 kg，會釋放約 1.8 kg CO2
淨差異：每公斤材料可為地球減少約 4.9 kg 碳排放
carbon.note: 此項數據基於甘蔗在種植生長階段對二氧化碳的吸收和儲存。多項權威的生命週期評估 (LCA) 均證實了 Bio-PE 原料生產的負碳屬性。

applications.title: 推薦適用領域
applications.intro: 任何使用常規聚乙烯 (PE) 的場合，均可完美無縫替換為 Bio-PE：

recycling.title: 包裝回收指引
recycling.distinction: Bio-PE 不可堆肥。它在物理和化學分子層面上與化石 PE 一致，在常規大自然或堆肥中不會自行分解。「生物基 (Bio)」是指其來源於植物，而非指其廢棄後的降解行為。
recycling.info: Bio-PE 可以 100% 混入現有的 2 號 (HDPE) 及 4 號 (LDPE) 塑料回收體系。回收工廠不需要將其單獨分揀，可與傳統塑料一同熔融再生。

faq.q1: Is Bio-PE compostable?
faq.a1: No, Bio-PE is not compostable. It is chemically identical to conventional PE. The 'bio' refers to its renewable plant-based origin, not its end-of-life. Bio-PE is recyclable in standard PE recycling streams.
faq.q2: What is the carbon benefit of Bio-PE?
faq.a2: Sugarcane absorbs CO2 as it grows, making Bio-PE production carbon negative. Each ton of Bio-PE captures approximately 3.09 tons of CO2 from the atmosphere, compared to fossil PE which emits ~1.8 tons CO2 per ton produced.
faq.q3: Does Bio-PE perform the same as regular PE?
faq.a3: Yes, Bio-PE has identical properties to fossil-based PE including heat seal temperature, barrier properties, flexibility, and printing characteristics. It's a direct drop-in replacement.
faq.q4: How much does Bio-PE cost compared to conventional PE?
faq.a4: Bio-PE typically costs 15-30% more than fossil PE due to production scale and feedstock costs. However, prices continue to decrease as production capacity increases.
faq.q5: What percentage of bio-based content is available?
faq.a5: We can offer Bio-PE pouches with up to 95% bio-based content. For multi-layer structures, the bio-based percentage depends on which layers use Bio-PE. Typical options are 30%, 50%, or 95% bio-based.

pcr.title: PCR Packaging | Post-Consumer Recycled Flexible Pouches
pcr.heroSubtitle: Flexible packaging with 30-100% post-consumer recycled content. Supporting the circular economy while maintaining quality.
pcr.introSummary: PCR packaging incorporates plastic recycled from consumer waste, reducing virgin plastic use and supporting circular economy goals. Our PCR pouches are GRS certified, FDA approved for food contact, and available in 30%, 50%, or 100% recycled content.
pcr.ctaDescription: Request a free sample and quote for recycled content packaging.

overview.title: What is PCR Packaging?
overview.intro: PCR (Post-Consumer Recycled) packaging contains plastic that has been recycled from consumer waste streams. By incorporating recycled content, brands reduce virgin plastic use and support the circular economy.
benefits: Reduces virgin plastic consumption
Supports circular economy and recycling infrastructure
Lower carbon footprint than virgin plastic
Maintains excellent packaging performance
GRS (Global Recycled Standard) certified available

contentLevels.title: PCR Content Levels
contentLevels.intro: We offer various PCR content levels to meet your sustainability goals:

level30.title: Entry Level
level30.desc: Good starting point for PCR adoption. Minimal impact on appearance.

level50.title: Recommended
level50.desc: Balanced approach. Significant sustainability impact with good performance.

level100.title: Maximum
level100.desc: For brands prioritizing maximum recycled content. Some optical variation.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety & Quality
foodSafety.intro: Our PCR materials meet stringent food safety requirements:
items: FDA approved for food contact (21 CFR 177)
Traceability – Known source streams, typically food-grade PET/PE
Testing – Migration testing and challenge testing performed
foodSafety.note: We use mechanical and advanced recycling technologies to ensure PCR materials meet food-contact safety requirements.

grs.title: GRS Certified
grs.desc: Global Recycled Standard certification verifies recycled content and tracks materials through the supply chain.

scs.title: SCS Verified
scs.desc: SCS Global Services verification for recycled content claims and environmental impact.

faq.q1: Is PCR packaging food safe?
faq.a1: Yes, our PCR materials are FDA approved for food contact. The recycled content undergoes advanced decontamination (super-cleaning) and rigorous testing to meet food safety standards including migration testing.
faq.q2: Does PCR affect print quality?
faq.a2: PCR may have slightly different optical properties (slight haze or color variation) compared to virgin plastic. At 30-50% PCR content, the impact on print quality is minimal. We recommend samples to evaluate appearance for your application.
faq.q3: What is the source of your PCR?
faq.a3: Our PCR comes from established post-consumer waste streams, primarily food-grade PET bottles and PE packaging. We work with certified recyclers who provide full traceability and use advanced sorting and cleaning processes.
faq.q4: How much does PCR packaging cost?
faq.a4: PCR typically costs 10-20% more than virgin plastic, though pricing fluctuates with recycled feedstock availability. The premium supports recycling infrastructure development and reflects the additional processing required.
faq.q5: Can PCR pouches still be recycled?
faq.a5: Yes, PCR pouches can be recycled again, continuing the circular economy loop. The recyclability depends on the overall pouch structure (mono-material vs multi-layer) rather than the PCR content itself.

faqs.question: 自立袋真的可以降解堆肥或回收嗎？
faqs.answer: 是的！我們提供兩條環保路線。可堆肥自立袋採用 BPI 和 TÜV 認證的生物薄膜（如植物澱粉 PLA 和 NatureFlex 木漿薄膜），在工業堆肥環境下 90-180 天內可完全分解為有機質。可回收自立袋則使用單一聚乙烯（PE）或聚丙烯（PP）結構，可直接放入軟塑料回收箱中循環利用。

faqs.question: 這些包裝袋能保持乾貨或咖啡的新鮮度嗎？
faqs.answer: 絕對可以。我們使用高阻隔多層複合技術，將氧氣和水汽透過率（OTR & WVTR）控制在 1.0 以下（部分金屬化纖維素結構可低於 0.1）。加上我們配備的專利單向排氣閥，可完美保護咖啡免受氧氣入侵，保鮮期長達 12 個月。

faqs.question: 你們支持哪些類型的底部結構？
faqs.answer: 我們支持最常見的圓底自立結構（適合輕質產品）、K-Seal 斜角底結構（可將重物重力分流，防止倒塌，適合 1kg 以上重物）以及平底/犁形底結構。

faqs.question: 可以定做特別尺寸或特殊形狀嗎？
faqs.answer: 可以。除了 20g 至 5kg 的標準規格，我們也提供精準至毫米的尺寸客製服務。此外，我們還能為您定做特殊異形袋（如燒瓶形、瓶裝形），讓您的品牌在貨架上脫穎而出。

faqs.q1: 1. 客製化包裝袋的起訂量（MOQ）是多少？
faqs.a1: 我們支持初創企業和新產品線的發布，提供僅 500 個袋子的行業超低數碼印刷起訂量。對於較大的批發量，我們提供 5,000 個起的高速凹版銅版印刷，以提供最終的批量成本效益。
faqs.q2: 2. 你們提供實體產前樣品嗎？
faqs.a2: 提供。我們會免費郵寄一個包含 10 個實體袋子的環保樣品套件，以便您測試阻隔性能。對於客製化訂單，我們會在 24 小時內生成 PDF 電子打樣，並可在批量生產前製作實體樣品袋。
faqs.q3: 3. 你們可以根據客製化的 CAD 體積圖紙製造自立袋嗎？
faqs.a3: 可以。我們的材料工程師會分析您的產品堆積密度，並將底部折撐和尺寸客製化精確到毫米級。我們在 24 小時內提供客製化刀模佈局 PDF。
faqs.q4: 4. 商業化生產和運輸的交期是多少？
faqs.a4: 數碼印刷需 7-10 個工作日；凹版銅版印刷需 12-14 天。快遞（DHL/FedEx）空運到美歐需要 5-7 個工作日，我們也提供 20-30 天的經濟海運。
faqs.q5: 5. 有哪些認證可以驗證環保合規性？
faqs.a5: 我們的生物聚合物擁有 BPI（可生物降解產品研究所 #10529618）和 TÜV Austria（OK Compost HOME）的官方證書編號。疊層符合 ASTM D6400（美國）和 EN 13432（歐盟）的可堆肥指南。
faqs.q6: 6. 提交哪些細節才能收到批發報價？
faqs.a6: 請提供預估的容量（或確切尺寸）、材料偏好（可堆肥牛皮紙、可回收 Mono-PE、高阻隔）、拉鏈/單向排氣閥要求、SKU 數量以及矢量圖稿。

whySup.card1Desc: 我們的精密折疊底部折撐技術可確保您的品牌挺立並保持醒目。360° 可客製化表面空間，用於展示醒目的圖案和合規徽章。
whySup.card2Desc: 工業高阻隔塗層可保護您的咖啡豆、原料或有機零食。動態氣體阻隔性能可確保長達 12 個月以上的完整氧氣和水分防禦。
whySup.card3Desc: 完全符合綠色零售標準。提供獲得認證的家庭可堆肥、工業可堆肥和路邊可回收單一材料結構。

useCases.case2Desc: 重型 K-Seal 底部專為重物（最高 2kg）進行了校準，具有防磨損、防油的層狀結構。
useCases.case3Desc: 經 BPI & OK Compost 認證的植物生物聚合物，符合嚴格的零售貨架穩定性和結構完整性。
useCases.case4Desc: 防靜電 PLA 塗層和防漏按壓拉鏈，防止粉末漏出和接縫破裂。

guide.title: 自立袋終極指南
guide.p1: 自立袋（SUP）徹底改變了軟包裝行業。這種創新的包裝袋也被稱為 Doypack，其特點是底部有折撐，使其能夠在零售貨架上直立放置，從而最大限度地提高品牌曝光率和貨架吸引力。無論您是包裝精品咖啡、有機寵物零食還是優質燕麥片，與玻璃瓶或金屬罐等剛性容器相比，自立袋都提供了一種多功能且高性價比的解決方案。
guide.fig1: 圖 1：客製化印刷實體自立袋，展示生動的環保數碼圖案
guide.section1Title: 為什麼品牌更青睞自立袋
guide.section1P1: 自立袋的主要優勢在於其結構設計。當袋子被填滿時，底部折撐會展開，形成一個堅供的底座。這不僅使產品能夠在擁擠的零售貨架上充當自己的廣告牌，而且使包裝袋在運輸和儲存過程中具有極高的空間利用率。在填充之前，這些包裝袋是扁平的，僅佔用剛性包裝所需空間的一小部分，從而顯著降低了運輸成本和碳足跡。
guide.section1P2: 此外，自立袋高度可客製化。利用我們的數碼印刷技術，品牌可以實現照片級的圖案、鮮艷的色彩和清晰的文字。您可以加入透明窗口以展示您的產品，加入可重複密封的拉鏈以在打開後保持新鮮度，以及加入易撕口以便消費者打開。
guide.section2Title: 可持續性：可堆肥和可回收選擇
guide.section2P1: 在 POUCH.ECO，我們理解向可持續包裝轉變的關鍵性。傳統的自立袋通常依賴於無法回收的混合材料塑料。我們對袋子進行了工程設計，以滿足最高的可持續性標準，同時不妥協阻隔性能或美學吸引力。
guide.fig2: 圖 2：高防潮阻隔 FSC 牛皮紙自立袋
guide.fig3: 圖 3：多層獲得認證的可堆肥阻隔纖維素薄膜疊層
guide.section2P2: 我們的產品線包括獲得 TUV 認證的家庭可堆肥袋，它們可以在 180 天內在後院堆肥箱中分解成有機物質。對於需要不同廢棄處理方案的品牌，我們還提供與軟塑料回收流完全兼容的單一材料可回收袋（PE/PE 或 PP/PP）。通過提供這些環保替代品，我們幫助初創品牌使包裝與其環保價值保持一致，並滿足日益增長的消費者對無塑料替代品的需求。
guide.section3Title: 為初創公司和新興品牌提供低起訂量
guide.section3P1: 歷史上，客製化印刷包裝需要 10,000 至 50,000 個袋子的巨大起訂量（MOQ），這給小企業創造了很高的准入門檻。我們利用先進的數碼印刷，提供僅 500 個袋子起的起訂量。這使初創公司能夠在不將資金佔用在過多包裝庫存的情況下測試新產品、推出季節性口味並開展促銷活動。

faqSection.title: 常見問題解答
faqSection.subtitle: 專業 B2B 買家需要詳細的驗證。展開下方的折疊選單以審查我們的標準商業政策：

cta.title: 準備好開始了嗎？
cta.desc: 獲取根據您確切的 CAD 體積規格客製化的優質印刷自立袋。超低 500 個起訂量。

overview.title: 客製化自立袋批發及供應
overview.text: 特製自立包裝袋（Stand-Up Pouches）是高級商業軟包裝的黃金標準。我們出自 BRCGS 認證工廠的生產線，為全球 DTC 品牌和食品批發商提供極佳的貨架展示效果、極輕的包裝重量及高強度的保鮮阻隔性能。
overview.kpisTitle: 關鍵 B2B 商業性能指標：
kpis: 減重 75% —— 比起玻璃罐或鐵罐，可大幅度節省倉庫儲存空間和遠途運輸的碳排放量。
360度展示空間 —— 整個外包裝袋均可進行全彩色數位印刷，採用安全的大豆植物油墨。
實用重復密封 —— 配備高強度的自封拉鏈及滑塊，防止產品受潮變質。
自動化裝填兼容 —— 精準的卷材厚度及拉伸控制，完美兼容各類自動包裝機（VFFS/HFFS）。

specifications.title: 技術參數說明及採購指南
specifications.text: 專業採購需要嚴格的數據支持。以下是我們包裝的技術指標如何轉化為您的商業效益：

applications.title: 專業 B2B 應用場景
applications.text: 我們客製印刷的站立袋專為各行業的合規和保鮮需求而設計：

coffee.title: ☕ 精品咖啡烘焙商
coffee.desc: 高阻隔氣密層配合 Goglio 單向排氣閥，既能排除咖啡豆釋放的二氧化碳，又能防止外氣進入，保證香氣持久。

organic.title: 🌱 有機食品及零食
organic.desc: 採用符合歐盟 EN 13432 標準的牛皮紙及 PLA 植物澱粉薄膜，滿足現代消費者對綠色環保的期望。

petFood.title: 🐾 寵物糧食與零食
petFood.desc: 特製 K-Seal 強韌底部，承重能力極強，防油脂滲透，適合裝填 1kg 至 5kg 的重物而不會破裂。

applications.kSealTitle: 重物站立優化：K-Seal 底部技術特點
applications.kSealDesc: 對於寵物飼料、大容量營養粉或大量咖啡豆，我們建議採用 **K-Seal 底部設計**。其特殊的斜角熱封線可將產品重力引導至兩側，使袋子立得更穩，防止底部折皺。
applications.kSealLink: 了解 K-Seal 如何提高容積與站立稳定性 →

gallery.title: 真實印刷樣品及材料驗證
gallery.text: 我們擁有 4 條高速數位印刷線，支持小批量多 SKUs 生產。以下是我們為客戶製造的自立袋樣品：

faqs.question: 1. 特製印刷自立袋的最低起訂量是多少？
faqs.answer: 為支持初創品牌發展，我們提供極低的數位印刷起訂量，每款設計僅 500 個起。對於大批量採購，我們提供凹版滾筒印刷，起訂量為 5,000 個，以提供最優惠的批發成本。

faqs.question: 2. 你們能提供樣品袋供測試嗎？
faqs.answer: 可以。我們可免費寄送包含 10 個樣品袋的環保樣品包，以便您測試防潮及包裝強度。在正式大貨生產前，我們也會提供 24 小時內的 PDF 電子版模圖，或製作數碼打樣袋供您確認。

faqs.question: 3. 你們能根據我們的容量要求定制專門的尺寸嗎？
faqs.answer: 可以。我們的包裝工程師會根據您產品的體積密度（如咖啡豆、粉末或顆粒），為您量身定制長、寬及底闊尺寸，精確至毫米。24 小時內可為您提供特製的刀模線圖。

faqs.question: 4. 訂單的生產及運輸時間是多少？
faqs.answer: 數位印刷通常需要 7-10 個工作天；凹版印刷大貨需要 12-14 個工作天。空運（DHL/FedEx）至歐美約 5-7 個工作天，海運約 20-30 個工作天。

faqs.question: 5. 你們的環保材料有什麼國際證書？
faqs.answer: 我們的生物降解材料均取得 BPI（美國可生物降解產品學會 #10529618）及 TÜV Austria（OK Compost HOME 家庭堆肥認證）。符合歐盟 EN 13432 及美國 ASTM D6400 標準。

faqs.question: 6. 詢價時需要提供什麼資訊？
faqs.answer: 請提供您大約需要的容量（或具體尺寸）、材料喜好（如可堆肥牛皮紙、可回收 PE、高阻隔鋁箔複合）、是否需要拉鏈或氣閥、SKU 數量以及設計圖稿格式。

overview.title: 客製化自立袋批發和供應
overview.intro: 客製化自立袋 (SUP) 代表了優質商業軟包裝的黃金標準。 我們的包裝袋源自 BRCGS 認證的工廠生產線，可提供最大限度的貨架展示、輕質材料節省和強大的屏障保護，專為全球 DTC 新創公司和擴大批發食品品牌而量身定制。
overview.listTitle: 主要 B2B 商業績效指標：
listItems: 佔地減少 75% – 與玻璃罐或金屬罐相比，大大減少了倉儲空間和長途運輸排放。
360° 品牌房地產 – 使用經過認證的大豆植物油墨印刷的全寬數位佈局覆蓋。
可重新密封的整合 – 耐用的拉鍊鎖和滑塊可防止產品貨架退化。
自動生產線相容性 – 設計的捲寬公差允許在自動 VFFS/HFFS 生產線上無縫整合。

specifications.title: 技術參數翻譯及購買指南
specifications.intro: 專業採購需要嚴格驗證物料資料。 以下是我們的原始技術指標如何直接轉化為 B2B 購買優勢的方式：
specifications.row1Col2: NatureFlex™ MetCellulose 或可回收 EVOH（OTR < 1.0，WVTR < 1.0）
specifications.row1Col3: 形成絕對的氣鎖和水鎖，將咖啡香氣、零食脆度和粉末完整性保留 12 個月以上。
specifications.row2Col2: 客製化毫米模切線（70-300 毫米寬，犁形/橢圓形/K 形密封角撐板底座）
specifications.row2Col3: 根據體積密度藍圖進行校準，防止底部密封破裂並確保完美的站立結構。
specifications.row3Col2: 密封強度> 35 N/15mm（工程低溫 PBAT/Mono-PE 密封樹脂）
specifications.row3Col3: 確保高壓自動包裝線運轉速度達到**每分鐘 65 袋**時的零爆裂洩漏。
specifications.row4Col2: 含有二級防潮層的三層雙壁出口紙箱
specifications.row4Col3: 保護捲材和成品袋免受海洋濕度退化和高堆裝運輸箱損壞。

applications.intro: 我們的客製化印刷立式袋經過精心設計，可滿足專業用例中的特定監管和化學屏障標準：
applications.card1Desc: 高 OTR 鎖與單向排氣閥結合，可排出氣體，同時阻止氧氣進入。 非常適合保持烘焙豆的完整性。
applications.card2Desc: 可堆肥牛皮紙和 PLA 澱粉生物膜經過歐洲 EN 13432 認證。滿足零售和消費者不斷增長的生態期望。
applications.card3Desc: 重型對角線 K 型密封底部，可防止油脂遷移並支援散裝體積重量（從 1 公斤到 5 公斤）而不會破裂。

faqs.question: 1. 客製化自立袋的最小訂購量 (MOQ) 是多少？
faqs.answer: 我們以業界最低的數位印刷最小起訂量（每個設計僅 500 份）為新創公司提供支援。 對於較大的批發量，我們可以從 5,000 台起進行凹版印刷，從而提供最終的批發成本效率。

faqs.question: 2.你們提供實體預生產樣品嗎？
faqs.answer: 是的，我們免費提供永續樣品套件，其中包含 10 個實體袋，用於測試阻隔性能。 對於客製化訂單，我們會產生 24 小時 PDF 軟校樣，並可以在大量生產之前建立精確的客製化數位模型。

faqs.question: 3.你們能根據客製化體積CAD圖製造自立袋嗎？
faqs.answer: 是的。 我們的材料工程師分析您的產品體積密度並客製化底部角板和尺寸（精確到毫米）。 我們在 24 小時內提供客製化模切線佈局 PDF。

faqs.question: 4. 商業運作的生產和運輸提前期是多少？
faqs.answer: 數位運行在 7-10 個工作天內完成；凹印版訂單需要 12-14 天。 DHL/FedEx 快遞空運至美國/歐盟需要 5-7 個工作天，經濟的海運則需要 20-30 天。

faqs.question: 5. 有哪些認證可用於驗證環保合規性？
faqs.answer: 我們的生物聚合物具有 BPI（生物降解產品研究所 #10529618）和 TÜV Austria (OK Compost HOME) 的官方證書編號。 堆疊符合 ASTM D6400（美國）和 EN 13432（歐盟）可堆肥性指南。

faqs.question: 6. 必須提交哪些詳細資料才能收到批發報價？
faqs.answer: 請提供估計的體積容量（或確切的尺寸）、材料偏好（可堆肥牛皮紙、單 PE 可回收、高阻隔）、拉鍊/排氣閥要求、SKU 數量和向量圖。

overview.title: 什麼是平底袋？
overview.text: 平底袋（也稱為方底袋或八邊封袋）具有一個長方形的平整底座，使袋子在填充產品後能夠如紙盒般穩固直立。相比傳統的自立袋，平底袋提供了更佳的展示視覺效果和更大的裝填空間。
benefits: 5面印刷區域，360度立體展示品牌信息
平整方底，貨架擺放穩固，不偏不倒
比起同等尺寸的自立袋容量提升 30%
外觀高檔，能顯著提升產品溢價
提供可降解及路邊可回收等環保材料
overview.intro: 平底袋（也稱為盒底袋或塊底袋）具有矩形底座，使其能夠以最大的穩定性直立。
overview.desc: 與標準自立袋相比，這種優質格式提供了卓越的貨架展示和容量。
overview.char1: 5 面板結構可實現最大的品牌表面
overview.char5: 提供可堆肥和可回收材料

construction.title: 平底袋的結構是怎樣的？
construction.text: 平底袋是由多個獨立面熱封拼接而成，形成穩固的立體結構：

panel5.title: 五面立體設計
items: 正面 —— 品牌主視覺展示區
背面 —— 產品成份、介紹及故事
兩側風琴邊 —— 額外的設計及展示空間
底部平底 —— 穩固的底座，亦可印刷條碼

closure.title: 密封配件選擇
items: 拉鏈（普通貼合拉鏈或魔術貼拉鏈）
馬口鐵封口條（咖啡包裝經典配搭）
單向排氣閥（釋放咖啡二氧化碳，阻隔氧氣）
易撕口設計，方便消費者開啟

construction.intro: 平底袋由多個面板構成，這些面板可折疊以形成矩形底部：
construction.col1Item1: 前面板 – 主要品牌區域
construction.col1Item3: 2 個側角撐板 – 額外的品牌空間
construction.col1Item4: 底部面板 - 穩定的底座，可包括印刷品
construction.col2Item1: 可重新密封的拉鍊（按壓閉合或滑塊）

faqs.question: 平底袋和普通自立袋有什麼區別？
faqs.answer: 平底袋具有長方形的平底座，填充後袋身呈立體箱狀，擁有5個展示面，且立在貨架上極其穩固。而自立袋是底部折疊熱封（圓底或K-Seal底），填充後袋身呈扁三角錐狀。平底袋的容量更大，外觀也更高檔。

faqs.question: 平底袋可以裝咖啡排氣閥嗎？
faqs.answer: 可以。我們可以在平底袋的任意位置（通常為正面中上方）安裝進口 Goglio 或國產優質單向排氣閥，以便新鮮烘焙的咖啡豆釋放二氧化碳，同時防止外氣進入導致豆子受潮氧化。

faqs.question: 特製印刷平底袋的最低起訂量是多少？
faqs.answer: 特製數位印刷的平底袋最低起訂量僅為 1,000 個；如果需要更優惠的單價且批量較大，凹版印刷大貨起訂量為 5,000 個。無印刷的現貨平底袋最低 500 個即可出貨。

faqs.question: 平底袋有環保材料嗎？
faqs.answer: 有的。我們提供由 Mono-PE（單一 PE）製成的路邊可回收平底袋，以及採用牛皮紙與 PLA 複合製成的生物降解可堆肥平底袋。

overview.title: 什麼是吸嘴袋？
overview.text: 吸嘴袋是在站立袋的基礎上，加裝了塑料倾倒嘴和旋蓋的軟包裝袋，專為液體、半流體和粘稠產品而設計。它既有軟包裝的低成本優勢，又有硬質容器的便利功能。
advantages: 旋蓋設計，方便重復開啟和密封
比起塑料瓶減少 70% 的塑料消耗
可在貨架上穩固站立展示
重量極輕，可大幅度節省運輸物流成本
提供高阻隔材料選項，防止液體變質
overview.intro: 吸嘴袋是一種靈活的自立袋，帶有內置傾倒嘴和蓋子，專為液體、半液體和粘性產品而設計。
overview.desc: 這種​​格式結合了軟包裝的成本效益和硬質容器的功能。
overview.adv1: 使用可重新封閉的蓋子輕鬆分配
overview.adv2: 比硬質瓶子少使用 70% 的塑料

ecoMaterials.title: 有哪些適合液體包裝的環保材料？
ecoMaterials.text: 我們可以使用符合環保理念的材料來生產吸嘴袋，既能降低環境負擔，又不會影響防漏及阻隔性能。

kraft.title: 🌾 什麼是 "防潮牛皮紙質感 (Kraft-Look)"？
kraft.p1: 防潮牛皮紙質感是在薄膜表面採用高精度數位印刷仿牛皮紙紋理，再覆以啞光塗層。它能為包裝帶來牛皮紙自然、高檔的視覺和觸覺質感，同時保持 100% 防水——這對於液體包裝是必不可少的。
kraft.p2: 真實的牛皮紙會吸水受潮，但我們的仿牛皮紙工藝既有環保美感，又能確保液體阻隔性完好無損。

eco.title: ℹ️ 重要資訊：正確認知「環保」材料
eco.p1: Bio-PE（生物基 PE）和 PCR（回收再生塑料）吸嘴袋在廢棄後並不能自動降解。但是，它們在產品生命週期的「起點」是非常環保的：

bio.title: Bio-PE (含30-50%生物基成分)
items: 原料來自甘蔗提取的聚乙烯
使用可再生的可持續資源
降低對石油化工原料的依賴
在 PE 回收體系中可 100% 循環再造

pcr.title: PCR (含30%回收再生塑料)
items: 含有消費後回收的再生塑料
減少全新塑料的消耗量
可提供 GRS（全球回收標準）認證
在 PE 回收體系中可 100% 循環再造

eco.p2: 需要完全可降解堆肥的材料？請看我們的可堆肥材料介紹（注意：由於防漏技術限制，完全可堆肥的液體吸嘴袋可選規格較少）

ecoMaterials.intro: 帶嘴袋可以採用永續材料生產，從而減少對環境的影響，同時又不影響液體阻隔性能。
ecoMaterials.kraftIntro: 牛皮紙外觀是一種數位印刷的牛皮紙圖案，在袋子表面塗有啞光塗層。 它為您提供牛皮紙自然、優質的外觀和觸感，同時100% 防水
ecoMaterials.kraftFootnote: 真正的牛皮紙會吸收水分，但我們的牛皮紙外觀表面可在不影響液體阻隔性能的情況下提供美觀性。
ecoMaterials.clarificationIntro: Bio-PE 和 PCR 袋不可生物降解或可堆肥。 它們是報廢的傳統塑膠。 然而，它們在生命週期的開始階段是環保的：
ecoMaterials.biopeItem3: 減少對化石燃料的依賴
ecoMaterials.biopeItem4: 可在 PE 流中完全回收
ecoMaterials.pcrItem4: 可在 PE 流中完全回收
ecoMaterials.compostableLink: 查看我們的可堆肥選項 →
ecoMaterials.compostableOutro: （注意：可堆肥的吸嘴袋供應有限）

faqs.question: 吸嘴袋可以用於高溫灌裝的產品嗎？
faqs.answer: 可以，我們提供專門的高溫複合材料（如耐高溫 PET/PA/R-CPP），可承受 85-90°C 的高溫熱灌裝，非常適合需要巴氏殺菌的果泥和熱充填醬料。

faqs.question: 客製化印刷吸嘴袋的最低起訂量是多少？
faqs.answer: 我們特製印刷的吸嘴袋起訂量僅為 1,000 個起。無印刷的現貨吸嘴袋最低起訂量為 500 個，極力降低初創品牌的准入門檻。

faqs.question: 吸嘴袋可以回收嗎？
faqs.answer: 是的，我們的 Mono-PE（單一 PE）和 PCR（再生 PE）材料吸嘴袋，在支持塑料軟包裝回收的地區可進行循環利用。而一些含有鋁箔（PET/AL/PE）的超高阻隔袋在部分地區回收難度較大。

faqs.question: 吸嘴袋是如何進行灌裝的？
faqs.answer: 吸嘴袋主要有兩種灌裝方式：第一種是在工廠製作時不封頂部，由灌裝機從頂部開口灌入液體後進行最終熱封；第二種是直接從吸嘴口注入液體，隨後由旋蓋機自動旋緊瓶蓋密封。

vacuumPouches.heroSubtitle: 工業級 PA/PE 真空包裝袋。延長食物保質期 3-5 倍。超強抗穿刺性能，支持低溫慢煮及高溫殺菌。
vacuumPouches.introSummary: 真空包裝袋通過在封口前抽乾包裝內空氣，使食品的保鮮期延長3至5倍。我們的高阻隔真空袋能有效防止氧化、水分流失及細菌污染。適用於商用真空機、外抽式真空機，並提供低溫慢煮及高溫殺菌規格。

cta.title: 索取客製化真空袋
cta.description: 索取免費樣品或為您的產品獲取詢價估計。

overview.title: 什麼是真空袋？
overview.text: 真空包裝袋是專為真空抽氣設計的包裝。在熱封口之前，機器會將袋內的空氣抽盡，使袋內達到高度真空狀態。高阻隔的薄膜結構能有效阻擋氧氣與水汽滲透，從而極大地延長食物的保質期。
benefits: 延長產品保質期達 3 - 5 倍
防止產品氧化變色及凍結燒（Freezer Burn）
完美保留食材的水分與新鮮口感
顯著減少食品過期造成的浪費
部分規格支持 Sous Vide 低溫慢煮
overview.descStrong: 真空袋專為真空包裝而設計，在密封前除去空氣，以延長產品保質期。
overview.descText: 這些高阻隔袋可防止氧氣、濕氣和污染物。
overview.benefit1: 延長保存期限（比標準長 3-5 倍）
overview.benefit3: 保持產品的新鮮度和品質

types.title: 真空袋的種類

chamber.title: 光面真空袋 (商用)
chamber.desc: 表面光滑，適用於商用室式真空包裝機。成本低，適合液體及醬料。

external.title: 紋路真空袋 (家用)
external.desc: 單面有微通道紋路，使家用外抽式真空機容易抽氣，兼容性極廣。

retort.title: 高溫蒸煮真空袋
retort.desc: 採用耐高溫材料，支持 121°C 高溫殺菌蒸煮，適合常溫保存食品。

sousvide.title: 低溫慢煮袋
sousvide.desc: 食品級無毒材料，支持水浴加熱慢煮（100°C 以下不釋放有害物質）。

types.card1Desc: 用於室式真空機的光滑表面。 成本較低，適用於液體。
types.card2Desc: 用於外部密封劑的壓花/溝槽表面。 相容更廣泛。
types.card3Desc: 耐熱用於巴氏殺菌/滅菌。 貨架穩定的產品。
types.card4Desc: 蒸煮袋的額定浸泡烹飪溫度可達 100°C。

specifications.title: 技術指標
items: 常用結構：PA/PE (尼龍/聚乙烯) 共擠或複合材料
透氧率 (OTR)：< 1.0 cc/m²/24hr (高阻氣性能)
透濕率 (MVTR)：< 2.0 g/m²/24hr (極佳鎖水防潮)
熱封強度：> 25 N/15mm (封口牢固不漏氣)
抗穿刺力：極強（能防止帶骨肉類刺破包裝）

materialComparison.title: 材料性能對比
materialComparison.guideDesc: 真空袋需要高阻隔材料。生鮮肉品選擇PA/PEN尼龍材質；如需真空低溫烹調則選擇可煮型；如果環保優先可以選擇Mono PERecyclable EditionBook。

faqs.question: 光面真空袋和紋路真空袋有什麼區別？
faqs.answer: 光面真空袋表面光滑，最適合商用「室式真空機」。機器會把整個袋子放入工作室內，使內外氣壓一致進行抽氣。而紋路真空袋單面有凹凸網格紋路，形成微小通道，使家用「外抽式真空機」（如 FoodSaver）能順利將袋內空氣吸出。

faqs.question: 真空袋可以放進開水里煮或用微波爐加熱嗎？
faqs.answer: 我們生產的 PA/PE 食品級低溫慢煮真空袋，支持 100°C 以下的水浴慢煮。如果您的食品需要放入高壓鍋進行 121°C 高溫高壓殺菌（如常溫熟食），必須選用專門的 PA/PP 高溫蒸煮真空袋。微波爐加熱前必須在袋上剪開一個缺口放氣。

faqs.question: 我該如何選擇真空袋的厚度？
faqs.answer: 一般無骨肉類、芝士、軟質食品，選用 70 至 90 微米厚度即可。如果是帶骨的排骨、堅硬的肉乾或有尖銳邊角的乾貨，建議選擇 120 至 150 微米厚度，以防刺穿漏氣。

faqs.question: 特製印刷真空袋的最低起訂量是多少？
faqs.answer: 特製印刷真空袋的最低起訂量為 1,000 個起。無印刷的現貨光面/紋路真空袋，最低 500 個起即可出貨。

faqs.question: 三邊封袋和四邊封袋有什麼區別？
faqs.answer: 三邊封袋是由單張薄膜對折（只密封三邊）製成，而四邊封袋則是使用兩張獨立薄膜（四個邊緣都密封）。三邊封更經濟，而四邊封提供的包裝表面積稍大，且正背面可使用不同的材料。

faqs.question: 平口袋最低起訂量是多少？
faqs.answer: 特製印刷的平口袋最低起訂量為 1,000 個。無印刷的平口袋最低 500 個。平口袋單價較低，即使少量訂購也具有極佳的經濟效益。

faqs.question: 平口袋可以加自封拉鏈嗎？
faqs.answer: 傳統的平口袋為一次性包裝，但我們也可以為其加入拉鏈。不過，如果您需要反復密封，自立袋通常能提供更好的功能和實用價值。

faqs.question: 平口袋有提供可降解的環保材料嗎？
faqs.answer: 是的，我們提供採用 PLA、牛皮紙/PLA 或纖維素薄膜製成的環保平口袋，這些材料均通過歐盟 EN 13432 工業堆肥認證。

faqs.question: 側插袋和平底袋有什麼差別？
faqs.answer: Side gusset bags have expandable side panels and lay relatively flat, while flat bottom bags have a rigid rectangular base for superior standing stability. Flat bottom bags offer more shelf presence but cost more. Side gusset bags are more traditional for coffee and offer good capacity.

faqs.question: 側插袋適合自動填充嗎？
faqs.answer: 是的，側面角撐板袋與 VFFS（垂直成型填充密封）機器配合良好。 我們可以為自動包裝線提供預製袋或捲材薄膜。

faqs.question: 有哪些尺寸可供選擇？
faqs.answer: 側邊插角袋的容量範圍為 100 克至 5 公斤。 常見規格有250公克、500公克、1公斤和2.5公斤。 超過 5,000 件的訂單可客製尺寸。

coffeeTea.question_whyIsAOnewayDegassing: 為什麼烘焙咖啡需要單向排氣閥？
coffeeTea.answer_freshlyRoastedCoffeeBeansDischarg: 新鮮烘焙的咖啡豆在烘焙後數天內會釋放大量二氧化碳 (CO2)。 如果沒有單向排氣閥，壓力的累積將導緻密封袋膨脹並破裂。 此閥門可讓積聚的二氧化碳安全逸出，同時阻止氧氣進入袋子，防止氧化和香氣損失。
coffeeTea.question_areCompostableCoffeeBagsComplet: 可堆肥咖啡袋在運送過程中是否完全穩定？
coffeeTea.answer_yesOurCertifiedCompostableCoffee: 是的！ 我們經過認證的可堆肥咖啡袋採用多層結構，結合了高強度牛皮紙和先進的植物性阻隔膜。 它們可提供與標準塑膠相同的高氧和防潮保護長達 12 個月，只有在暴露於活躍的工業堆肥因子時才會分解。
coffeeTea.question_howDoIChooseBetween: 如何在可回收 Mono-PE 和可堆肥牛皮紙之間進行選擇？
coffeeTea.answer_chooseCompostableKraftIfYour: 如果您的品牌故事圍繞著零廢棄物循環展開，而您的本地客戶群可以輕鬆使用商業堆肥箱，請選擇可堆肥牛皮紙。 如果您想要最大的透明度（產品窗口）、更高的防潮層和標準的商店回收回收通道，請選擇可回收的 Mono-PE。
coffeeTea.question_whatIsTheMinimumOrder: 定製品牌印刷的最低訂購量是多少？
coffeeTea.answer_whileTypicalPackagingFactoriesReq: 雖然典型的包裝工廠需要 20,000 多個袋子的大量訂單，但 Achieve Pack 專注於低最小起訂量生產。 您可以訂購完全客製化印刷的垂直咖啡閥口袋或散裝茶袋，起訂量僅為 500 件，使新創公司能夠測試市場需求。

snacksFood.question_howDoYouKeepPotato: 如何在可堆肥袋中保持薯片和椒鹽捲餅鬆脆？
snacksFood.answer_weUseMultilayerCompostableFilms: 我們使用嵌入高阻隔纖維素芯的多層可堆肥薄膜。 此核心具有極低的濕氣透過率 (WVTR)，可防止水分進入袋內，並確保零食在長達 12 個月的時間內保持完美鬆脆。
snacksFood.question_willNaturalSnackOilsDegrade: 天然零食油會降解可堆肥植物性內襯嗎？
snacksFood.answer_notOurEngineeredLinersWe: 不是我們設計的襯裡。 我們將可堆肥薄膜與經過針對植物油、堅果脂肪和有機鹽進行廣泛測試的特定耐油脂植物聚合物共擠出，確保接縫牢固而不會洩漏。
snacksFood.question_canIUseWindowsOn: 我可以在可回收的單一材料零食袋上使用窗戶嗎？
snacksFood.answer_absolutelyUnlikeTraditionalFoilBa: 絕對地！ 與傳統的鋁箔袋不同，我們的路邊可回收單 PE 和單 PP 袋可以包含定制的高清晰度窗口。 由於整個袋子仍然是單一聚合物結構，因此它完全符合靈活的回收流程。
snacksFood.question_whatIsTheTurnaroundTime: 客製化零食包裝訂單的周轉時間是多少？
snacksFood.answer_forStandardStockSizesWith: 對於帶有自訂標籤的標準庫存尺寸，我們會在 7-10 天內發貨。 對於具有客製尺寸、形狀和功能的完全客製化凹版印刷袋，標準週轉時間為 15-20 天，是業界平均速度的兩倍。

petFood.question_howDoYouPreventRaw: 如何防止生動物油滲入可堆肥紙？
petFood.answer_weUseAnAdvancedMultilayer: 我們採用先進的多層共聚物結構，並整合了高度耐油脂的內膜芯。 這種可堆肥密封劑芯可阻止天然脂肪和油滲透，確保外部未漂白牛皮紙保持完全無污且乾燥。
petFood.question_willStrongPetTreatOdors: 強烈的寵物治療氣味會從可回收的單一 PE 袋中逸出嗎？
petFood.answer_noOurCurbsiderecyclableMonopePouc: 不會。我們的路邊可回收單 PE 袋採用高性能 EVOH 阻隔塗層共擠而成。 這種化合物可阻擋高達 99.7% 的揮發性有機氣味，將芳香濃鬱的美食密封地鎖在裡面，而不會弄髒食品儲藏室。
petFood.question_canTheseBagsSupportHeavy: 這些袋子可以支撐較重的寵物食品重量（例如 5 公斤至 10 公斤）嗎？
petFood.answer_yesForLargeformatAndHeavy: 是的！ 對於大規格和較重的寵物食品，我們推薦我們的平底角撐袋，具有加固的四邊形密封角、厚聚合物層壓板和內置側手柄。 這些產品經過跌落測試，可承受 1.5 公尺高處跌落而不會出現接縫破裂。
petFood.question_whatIsTheMoqFor: 客製化印刷寵物食品包裝袋的最小起訂量是多少？
petFood.answer_weAccommodateSmallBusinessStartup: 我們為小型企業新創公司提供客製化印刷的立式零食袋和散裝寵物食品袋，最小起訂量僅為 500 件。 全彩數位客製化意味著零印版安裝費用。

supplementsPowders.question_howDoYouPreventFine: 如何防止細補粉堵塞拉鍊？
supplementsPowders.answer_wePreintegrateASpecializedPowderp: 我們預先整合了專門的“防粉”拉鍊。 與具有平坦山谷的標準拉鍊不同，粉末拉鍊具有微凹槽和自清潔輪廓，而平坦的山谷會沉積灰塵並阻塞密封。 按下時，灰塵會自然地被推入安全凹槽中，確保 100% 氣密閉合。
supplementsPowders.question_areCompostablePouchesSuitableFo: 可堆肥袋適合吸濕性蛋白粉嗎？
supplementsPowders.answer_yesWhenEngineeredCorrectlyOur: 是的，如果設計正確的話。 我們經過認證的可堆肥袋具有內部金屬化生物纖維素核心。 該芯具有極低的濕氣透過率 (WVTR)，可防止濕氣進入袋並確保粉末乾燥、自由流動長達 12 個月。
supplementsPowders.question_howDoIProtectSensitive: 如何保護敏感的維生素和礦物質免受光降解？
supplementsPowders.answer_vitaminsAndNutritionalCompoundsAr: 維生素和營養化合物具有高度光敏感。 為了防止氧化和降解，我們建議使用帶有固體金屬箔芯的固體不透明材料。 如果您想要自然的未漂白外觀，我們的不透明可堆肥牛皮紙袋是完美的解決方案。
supplementsPowders.question_whatIsTheMinimumOrder: 客製化印刷補充袋的最低訂購量是多少？
supplementsPowders.answer_weSupportStartupHealthBrands: 我們透過提供客製化印刷補充袋來支持新創健康品牌，起訂量低至 500 單位。 數位化客製化確保缸板安裝費用為零。

babyFood.question_areTheseBabyFoodSpout: 這些嬰兒食品吸嘴袋是否 100% BPA、無毒性？
babyFood.answer_yesEveryBabyFoodPackaging: 是的！ 我們生產的每個嬰兒食品包裝袋均經過認證，100% 不含雙酚 A (BPA)、雙酚 S (BPS)、鄰苯二甲酸鹽和重金屬。 我們嚴格使用符合 FDA 和 EU 標準的食品級共聚物，確保熱灌裝過程中的零化學遷移。
babyFood.question_canTheseSpoutPouchesWithstand: 這些吸嘴袋能否承受 90°C 的熱灌裝滅菌？
babyFood.answer_yesAbsolutelyOurBabyFood: 是的，絕對是。 我們的嬰兒食品吸嘴袋採用高性能共聚物設計，熱穩定性高達 95°C。 這使得烘焙商和食品品牌可以直接在袋內對有機果泥進行熱灌裝或巴氏殺菌，而不會發生密封洩漏。
babyFood.question_whatMakesThePreinstalledCaps: 是什麼讓預先安裝的蓋子「防堵」？
babyFood.answer_weUsePediatricapprovedLargediamet: 我們使用兒科認可的大直徑安全帽。 與標準小瓶蓋不同，防窒息瓶蓋具有寬闊的結構輪廓和內置通風孔。 如果嬰兒不小心將蓋子放入口中，通風孔會讓空氣自由流通，符合嚴格的全球兒童安全準則。
babyFood.question_whatIsTheMoqFor: 客製化印刷嬰兒食品袋的最小起訂量是多少？
babyFood.answer_weAccommodateSmallBatchTesting: 我們透過提供客製化印刷帶嘴袋來適應小批量測試，起訂量僅為 500 件。 數位客製化允許新創品牌運行多種果泥，而無需花費在盤子設定上。

frozenFood.question_whyDoStandardPlasticsCrack: 為什麼標準塑膠在冰箱中會破裂或刺穿？
frozenFood.answer_standardPlasticsLikeStandardLowde: 標準低密度聚乙烯 (LDPE) 等標準塑膠在零度以下的溫度下會經歷玻璃化轉變，導致分子結構變得堅硬、玻璃狀且高度脆弱。 為了防止開裂，我們採用了專門的高柔性共聚物，可在低至 -30°C 的溫度下保持分子彈性。
frozenFood.question_howDoYouPreventFreezer: 如何防止凍傷和霜結晶？
frozenFood.answer_freezerBurnIsCausedBy: 凍傷是由冷凍脫水引起的，即水蒸氣從食物中逸出到空氣中。 我們透過使用具有極低濕氣透過率 (WVTR) 的多層屏障來消除這一問題。 這樣可以將 100% 的水分鎖在內部，防止結霜並保持食物新鮮。
frozenFood.question_canCompostablePackagingStandUp: 可堆肥包裝能否承受潮濕的冰箱冷凝？
frozenFood.answer_yesWhenEngineeredCorrectlyOur: 是的，如果設計正確的話。 我們經過認證的可堆肥冷凍袋採用特定的防潮植物襯裡。 雖然它們會在活躍的微生物條件下在商業堆肥場中自然降解，但它們在零度以下的儲存過程中保持完全穩定和堅固。
frozenFood.question_whatIsTheMinimumOrder: 客製化印刷冷凍食品袋的最小起訂量是多少？
frozenFood.answer_weSupportStartupColdChain: 我們透過提供客製化印刷真空袋和立式冷凍食品袋來支持新創冷鏈品牌，最低訂購量僅為 500 個。 數位客製化確保零印版設定費用。

frozenFood.highMoistureVaporTransmissionWvtr: 高濕氣透過率 (WVTR) 會使冷凍食品脫水，破壞質地。
frozenFood.submergeTestBagsIn25c: 將測試袋浸入 -25°C 液態氮模擬室中進行彎曲檢查。
frozenFood.assessDirectFoodContactSafety: 透過 FDA 食品安全合規證書評估直接食品接觸安全。
frozenFood.performStandardDropTest12m: 執行標準跌落測試（-18°C 下 1.2m 跌落）以驗證零接縫裂縫。
frozenFood.solidMetallicCoresOrSpecialized: 固體金屬芯或專門的屏障膜可消除脫水。
frozenFood.plasticsLoseFlexibilityAndCrack: 塑膠在基本搬運負載下會失去柔韌性並破裂或刺穿。
frozenFood.confirmMinimumStorageTemperatureRequirem: 確認最低儲存溫度要求（例如，-10°C 與 -30°C）。

saucesCondiments.question_whatIsTheBestSpout: 醬料品牌最好的吸嘴袋供應商是哪家？
saucesCondiments.answer_achievePackIsALeading: Achieve Pack 是一家領先的醬料和調味品品牌吸嘴袋供應商。 我們提供 100 毫升至 2 公升的吸嘴袋，配有可重新封閉的蓋子、高達 85°C 的熱灌裝能力以及適合耐儲存產品的蒸煮選項。 最小起訂量從 500 件起。
saucesCondiments.question_canPouchesBeUsedFor: 袋裝熱灌裝醬料可以用嗎？
saucesCondiments.answer_yesWeOfferPouchesSuitable: 是的，我們提供適合高達 85°C 熱灌裝應用的袋子。 對於更高的溫度，我們提供可蒸煮的袋子，可以承受 121°C 的滅菌，使醬汁能夠穩定保存。
saucesCondiments.question_whatAreRefillPouchesAnd: 什麼是補充袋以及為何使用它們？
saucesCondiments.answer_refillPouchesAreFlexiblePouches: 補充袋是一種柔性袋，設計用於在家中補充硬瓶子或分配器。 與新瓶子相比，它們使用的塑膠大約減少了 80%，在保持便利性的同時提供了顯著的環境效益。 非常適合環保意識的醬料品牌。
saucesCondiments.answer_standardSaucePouchesAreMultimater: 標準醬料袋由多種材料製成，回收具有挑戰性。 我們提供可在標準 PE 回收流中回收的單一 PE 替代品。 請查看我們的可回收材料頁面以了解選項。
saucesCondiments.question_whatSizesAreAvailableFor: 醬汁嘴袋有哪些尺寸可供選擇？
saucesCondiments.answer_weOfferSpoutPouchesFrom: 我們提供從 100 毫升單份裝到 2 公升散裝規格的吸嘴袋。 單份小袋的容量範圍為 10-50 毫升，適用於餐飲服務應用。 帶翻蓋的自立袋容量為 200 毫升至 1 公升。
saucesCondiments.question_whichCompanyOffersTheBest: 哪家公司提供最好的環保醬料包裝？
saucesCondiments.answer_achievePackOffersSustainableSauce: Achieve Pack 提供可持續的醬料包裝，包括可回收的單 PE 吸嘴袋和補充袋，其塑膠用量比硬瓶少 80%。 我們可以幫助您的品牌在不犧牲功能的情況下減少對環境的影響。

about.title: About Achieve Pack | Sustainable Packaging Since 2011
about.description: Learn about Achieve Pack's mission to make sustainable packaging accessible. Founded in 2011, we serve 500+ brands with eco-friendly flexible packaging solutions.
about.heroSubtitle: Making sustainable packaging the easy choice since 2011. From Hong Kong to the world, we're helping brands reduce their environmental impact without compromising on quality.
about.introSummary: Achieve Pack is the parent company behind pouch.eco, founded in 2011 with a mission to make sustainable packaging accessible to businesses of all sizes. We combine decades of packaging expertise with a genuine commitment to environmental responsibility.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2011 in Hong Kong, Achieve Pack® has grown from a small packaging supplier into a leading provider of sustainable flexible packaging solutions. Our journey began with a simple belief: businesses shouldn't have to choose between quality packaging and environmental responsibility.
story.p2: Today, we serve over 500 brands worldwide, from artisan startups to established enterprises, helping them transition to eco-friendly packaging without compromising on quality, performance, or budget.
story.p3: Under the pouch.eco brand, we've made sustainable packaging accessible to businesses of all sizes, with low minimum order quantities and fast turnaround times that traditional manufacturers simply can't match.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.intro: Our mission is to make sustainable packaging the easy choice for every business. We believe that environmental responsibility shouldn't be a premium feature—it should be the standard.
points: Reducing plastic waste in the packaging industry
Making certified eco materials accessible to all business sizes
Helping brands tell their sustainability story
Innovating new materials and solutions for a circular economy

sustainability.title: Sustainability First
sustainability.desc: Every decision we make considers environmental impact. From material selection to shipping methods, sustainability guides our operations.

quality.title: Quality Without Compromise
quality.desc: Eco-friendly doesn't mean lower quality. Our packaging meets the same rigorous standards as conventional materials.

partnership.title: Customer Partnership
partnership.desc: We work as partners, not just suppliers. Your success is our success, and we're invested in helping you achieve your goals.

innovation.title: Innovation & Transparency
innovation.desc: We continuously develop new materials and share honest information about capabilities and limitations.

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: Our team combines decades of packaging industry experience with a passion for sustainability. From material scientists to customer support specialists, every team member is committed to your success.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.outro: Every pouch we produce represents a step away from conventional plastics and toward a more sustainable future. Join the hundreds of brands already making a difference.

faq.q1: Where is Achieve Pack located?
faq.a1: Our headquarters is in Hong Kong, with manufacturing facilities in China. We ship worldwide and have customers across North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia.
faq.q2: What makes Achieve Pack different from other packaging suppliers?
faq.a2: We specialize exclusively in sustainable packaging with low MOQs (100 pieces), fast turnaround (2-3 weeks for samples), and comprehensive certification documentation. We're partners, not just suppliers.
faq.q3: Do you work with startups and small businesses?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Our low minimum order quantities make sustainable packaging accessible to businesses of all sizes. Many of our customers started with us as startups and have grown with our support.
faq.q4: What certifications do your materials have?
faq.a4: Our materials are certified to various international standards including EN 13432, ASTM D6400, GRS (Global Recycled Standard), and food safety certifications (FDA, EU 10/2011). We provide documentation with every order.

cta.title: Partner With Us
cta.description: Join 500+ brands already making a sustainable impact with Achieve Pack.

certificates.title: Packaging Certifications | EN 13432, GRS, FDA Compliance
certificates.description: Explore Achieve Pack's comprehensive certifications: EN 13432, ASTM D6400, GRS, FDA, BRC, and more. Full documentation provided with every order.
certificates.heroSubtitle: Third-party verified certifications you can trust. From compostability to food safety, our certifications give you confidence in every claim.
certificates.introSummary: Our packaging materials are certified to the world's leading standards for compostability, recyclability, and food safety. We provide complete documentation with every order to support your compliance and marketing needs.

overview.title: Our Certifications & Compliance
overview.p1: At Achieve Pack, we believe that certifications are more than just badges—they're proof of our commitment to quality, safety, and sustainability. Every certification we hold represents rigorous third-party testing and ongoing audits.
overview.p2: We provide full documentation with every order, giving you the confidence to make claims about your packaging and satisfy retailer requirements.

en13432.name: EN 13432
en13432.desc: The European standard for compostable packaging. Requires 90% disintegration within 12 weeks and complete biodegradation within 6 months in industrial composting conditions.

astm.name: ASTM D6400
astm.desc: US standard for plastics designed for municipal/industrial aerobic composting facilities. Testing equivalent to EN 13432, recognized across North America.

australian.name: AS 4736 / AS 5810
australian.desc: AS 4736 for commercial compostability and AS 5810 for home compostability. Required for compostable claims in Australia and New Zealand.

okcompost.name: OK Compost HOME
okcompost.desc: Certification for materials that biodegrade in home composting conditions (20-30°C). The gold standard for consumer-level compostability.

grs.name: GRS - Global Recycled Standard
grs.desc: Our PCR (post-consumer recycled) materials are GRS certified, verifying the recycled content and tracking it through the supply chain. This certification is increasingly required by major retailers.

mono.title: Mono-Material Recyclability
mono.desc: Our mono-PE and mono-PP pouches are designed for recyclability in existing recycling streams. Structure verified by third-party testing.

storeDropOff.title: Store Drop-Off Compatible
storeDropOff.desc: Many of our recyclable pouches qualify for store drop-off recycling programs (like How2Recycle's Store Drop-Off label).

foodSafety.title: Food Safety Certifications
foodSafety.intro: All our packaging materials intended for food contact are certified to international food safety standards. We can provide documentation for regulatory compliance in your target markets.

fda.name: FDA 21 CFR
fda.desc: US Food & Drug Administration compliance for food contact materials

eu.name: EU 10/2011
eu.desc: European regulation for plastic materials in food contact

migration.name: Migration Testing
migration.desc: Third-party verified migration testing for specific food types

iso.name: ISO 9001:2015
iso.desc: Quality Management System certification. Demonstrates our commitment to consistent quality and continuous improvement in all processes.

brc.name: BRC Packaging Materials
brc.desc: British Retail Consortium certification for packaging manufacturers. Often required by major retailers for food packaging suppliers.

fsc.name: FSC Chain of Custody
fsc.desc: For paper-based products, our FSC certification ensures responsibly sourced paper from well-managed forests.

sedex.name: SEDEX Membership
sedex.desc: Ethical trade audit platform. We maintain visibility into our ethical, labor, and environmental practices.

documentation.title: Documentation We Provide
documentation.intro: We can provide the certification documents you need for retailer compliance, regulatory submissions, or marketing claims:

faq.q1: Do you provide certification documents with orders?
faq.a1: Yes, we provide all relevant certification documents with every order. This includes certificates of compliance, food safety declarations, and specific certifications like EN 13432 or GRS certificates as applicable.
faq.q2: Are your compostable materials certified in my country?
faq.a2: Our compostable materials are certified to EN 13432 (EU), ASTM D6400 (US), and AS 4736/5810 (Australia). These are the major international standards. Contact us for specific regional requirements.
faq.q3: Can I use your certifications in my marketing?
faq.a3: Yes, with the proper documentation we provide, you can make certified claims about your packaging. We'll advise on correct wording and logo usage to ensure compliance.
faq.q4: How often are your certifications renewed?
faq.a4: Most certifications require annual audits and renewal. We maintain current certifications and can provide up-to-date documentation at any time.

cta.title: Get Certified Packaging
cta.description: Order eco-friendly packaging with full certification documentation.

factoryTour.description: Take a virtual tour of Achieve Pack's state-of-the-art sustainable packaging facility. See how we manufacture eco-friendly pouches with precision and quality control.
factoryTour.heroSubtitle: Step inside our manufacturing facility where sustainable packaging innovation meets precision engineering. Discover how we bring your eco-friendly pouches to life.
factoryTour.introSummary: Our factory combines modern manufacturing technology with rigorous quality control and sustainable practices. From material sourcing to final inspection, every step is designed to deliver premium eco-friendly packaging.

welcome.title: Welcome to Our Virtual Factory Tour
welcome.p1: Step inside our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility where sustainable packaging comes to life. Our factory combines cutting-edge technology with rigorous quality control to produce eco-friendly pouches that meet the highest international standards.
welcome.p2: While we can't bring you physically to our facility, this virtual tour gives you insight into how we manufacture your packaging with precision, care, and environmental responsibility.

materials.title: Material Sourcing & Storage
points: All raw materials sourced from certified suppliers
Climate-controlled storage for material integrity
Batch tracking for full traceability
Regular quality testing of incoming materials
materials.outro: We maintain partnerships with leading sustainable material manufacturers worldwide, including suppliers of certified compostable films, GRS-certified recycled plastics, and food-safe bio-based materials.

printing.title: Printing Department
printing.intro: Our printing department features both digital and flexographic (plate) printing capabilities, allowing us to handle orders from 100 pieces to millions with consistent quality.

digital.title: Digital Printing
points: Unlimited colors at no extra cost
Perfect for short runs (100-5,000 pcs)
Variable data printing available
No plate costs

plate.title: Plate Printing
points: Up to 10 colors
Best for large volumes (5,000+ pcs)
Pantone color matching
Lower unit cost at scale

printing.outro: All inks used are food-safe and compliant with FDA and EU regulations. We use solvent-free and water-based inks where possible.

lamination.title: Lamination & Material Processing
lamination.intro: Our lamination department bonds multiple material layers to create the barrier properties your product needs. This is where we combine materials like kraft paper with PLA, or create mono-material structures for recyclability.

pouchMaking.title: Pouch Making & Conversion
pouchMaking.intro: Our pouch-making lines convert printed and laminated films into finished pouches. We can produce all major pouch formats including stand-up pouches, flat bottom bags, side gusset bags, and more.
pouchMaking.outro: Each line is equipped for different pouch styles and can integrate features like zippers, valves, spouts, and tear notches.

quality.title: Quality Control Laboratory
quality.intro: Our in-house laboratory performs rigorous testing at every production stage. From incoming material inspection to final product testing, we ensure every pouch meets specifications.

sustainability.title: Sustainability Practices
sustainability.intro: Sustainability isn't just in our products—it's in our operations. Our factory implements comprehensive environmental management practices.

waste.title: Waste Reduction
points: Production waste recycled or composted
Optimized cutting patterns minimize trim waste
Solvent recovery systems

energy.title: Energy Efficiency
points: LED lighting throughout facility
Energy-efficient machinery
Heat recovery systems

faq.q1: Can I visit your factory in person?
faq.a1: Yes, we welcome factory visits by appointment. Contact us to schedule a visit to our manufacturing facility. We also offer detailed video tours for customers who cannot travel.
faq.q2: What quality certifications does your factory have?
faq.a2: Our facility is ISO 9001 certified for quality management, BRC certified for food packaging, and maintains FSC chain of custody certification for paper-based products.
faq.q3: What is your production capacity?
faq.a3: We can produce over 100,000 pouches per day across our production lines. For large orders, we can scale up with advance notice. Rush orders are also possible for urgent needs.
faq.q4: How do you ensure consistency across batches?
faq.a4: We maintain detailed production records, use calibrated equipment, and perform statistical process control (SPC) to ensure every batch meets the same standards. Color matching is verified with spectrophotometers.

cta.title: See It For Yourself
cta.description: Request a personalized video tour or schedule an in-person visit to our facility.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions | Packaging FAQs
faqs.description: Find answers to common questions about sustainable packaging: MOQs, materials, production times, shipping, and more. Comprehensive FAQ from Achieve Pack.
faqs.heroSubtitle: Answers to your packaging questions. Find information about ordering, materials, production, shipping, and more.
faqs.introSummary: Browse our comprehensive FAQ covering ordering, materials, production, shipping, and customization. Can't find your answer? Contact us directly—we're happy to help.

faq.q1: How do I get started?
faq.a1: Simply contact us through our website, email, or WhatsApp. Share your product details and requirements, and we'll provide a quotation within 24-48 hours.
faq.q2: Can I see samples before ordering?
faq.a2: Absolutely! We provide material samples, blank pouches for test filling, and can produce printed samples with your design before full production.
faq.q3: Do you work with small businesses and startups?
faq.a3: Yes! Our low MOQs (100 pieces for digital printing) make us ideal for small businesses. Many of our customers started small and have grown with us.
faq.q4: What support do you provide after delivery?
faq.a4: We provide ongoing support including reorder assistance, design updates, and help resolving any issues. We're partners for the long term, not just one order.

leadTime.description: Understand Achieve Pack's lead times for sustainable packaging. Production timelines, shipping options, and tips for planning your packaging orders.
leadTime.heroSubtitle: Plan your packaging orders with confidence. Understand production and shipping timelines for smooth inventory management.
leadTime.introSummary: Total lead time ranges from 3-4 weeks (rush digital + express) to 10-12 weeks (plate printing + sea freight). This guide helps you understand timelines and plan effectively.

faq.q1: Can you guarantee delivery dates?
faq.a1: We provide estimated timelines based on typical production and shipping. While we strive to meet all dates, factors like customs delays or shipping disruptions can occasionally affect delivery. We keep you updated throughout.
faq.q2: What happens if I need to change my delivery date?
faq.a2: Contact us as early as possible. Before production starts, we can usually adjust. Once production begins, changes may not be possible, but we can sometimes adjust shipping speed.
faq.q3: Do you offer rush production?
faq.a3: Yes, for digital printing orders. Rush fees apply and depend on current production load. Contact us with your deadline and we'll confirm if rush is possible.
faq.q4: How do holidays affect lead time?
faq.a4: Chinese New Year (late Jan/Feb) significantly impacts production—plan 2-3 weeks extra. Other holidays have minimal impact. We'll advise on any timing concerns during quotation.

cta.title: Need a Timeline Estimate?
cta.description: Tell us about your order and we'll provide a specific timeline.

highBarrier.title: High Barrier Packaging | 12-24 Month Shelf Life Premium Pouches
highBarrier.description: High barrier eco-friendly packaging for products with 12-24 month shelf life. Recyclable mono-PE with EVOH, mono-PP options. Perfect for coffee, supplements, baby food, and sensitive products.
highBarrier.heroSubtitle: Maximum protection with 12-24 month shelf life. Recyclable high barrier options for premium products.
highBarrier.introSummary: High barrier packaging provides maximum oxygen and moisture protection for products requiring 12-24 month shelf life. Our recyclable mono-PE with EVOH structures offer premium protection while maintaining sustainability credentials.

faq.q1: Can high barrier packaging still be recyclable?
faq.a1: Yes! Our mono-PE with EVOH layer is recyclable because the EVOH is <5% of total structure. We also offer mono-PP and metallized mono-PE options that are 100% recyclable while providing excellent barrier properties.
faq.q2: What's the difference between EVOH and aluminum barrier?
faq.a2: EVOH is a plastic-based oxygen barrier that allows the packaging to remain recyclable. Aluminum provides similar barrier but makes packaging non-recyclable. Our EVOH structures offer comparable performance with recyclability.
faq.q3: Do I need high barrier for coffee?
faq.a3: For ground coffee and specialty whole beans, yes - high barrier with degassing valve is recommended. For standard whole bean coffee with quick turnover, medium barrier may suffice. We offer free testing to determine optimal choice.
faq.q4: What certifications do your high barrier materials have?
faq.a4: Our high barrier materials are food-safe certified (FDA, EU 10/2011), and we provide OTR/MVTR test certificates. PCR options are GRS certified. We can provide custom testing documentation for your quality requirements.

cta.title: Protect Your Premium Products
cta.description: Request free OTR/MVTR testing and samples to validate high barrier performance for your products.

lowBarrier.title: Low Barrier Packaging | Eco-Friendly 3-6 Month Shelf Life Pouches
lowBarrier.description: Low barrier eco-friendly packaging for products with 3-6 month shelf life. Home compostable Kraft+PLA, NatureFlex cellulose. Perfect for cookies, tea, granola, and dry goods.
lowBarrier.heroSubtitle: Best eco-credentials with 3-6 month shelf life. Home compostable and recyclable options for sustainable brands.
lowBarrier.introSummary: Low barrier packaging offers the best sustainability credentials with 3-6 months shelf life protection. Perfect for products with fast turnover or naturally dry goods that don't require extended protection.

faq.q1: Is low barrier packaging suitable for my product?
faq.a1: Low barrier is ideal for dry products consumed within 3-6 months: cookies, tea, granola, dried fruits, rice, and similar dry goods. If your product is moisture or oxygen sensitive, consider medium or high barrier options.
faq.q2: Can low barrier packaging be compostable?
faq.a2: Yes! Many low barrier options like Kraft+PLA and NatureFlex are home compostable, breaking down in backyard compost within 6-12 months. These are certified to EN 13432 and OK Home standards.
faq.q3: What's the price difference vs medium barrier?
faq.a3: Low barrier materials typically cost 15-25% less than medium barrier options. The cost savings plus better eco-credentials make it an excellent choice when your product doesn't require extended shelf life.
faq.q4: How do I transition from plastic to low barrier eco-packaging?
faq.a4: We offer free consultation and samples to test compatibility. Many brands successfully switch dry goods to low barrier compostable packaging. We help you validate shelf life and optimize the transition.

cta.title: Start Your Eco Journey
cta.description: Request samples of our home compostable low barrier packaging.

mediumBarrier.title: Medium Barrier Packaging | 6-12 Month Shelf Life Recyclable Pouches
mediumBarrier.description: Medium barrier eco-friendly packaging for products with 6-12 month shelf life. Recyclable mono-PE, Bio-PE, PCR options. Perfect for coffee, nuts, pet food, and protein powders.
mediumBarrier.heroSubtitle: Balanced protection with 6-12 month shelf life. Recyclable options for most food products.
mediumBarrier.introSummary: Medium barrier packaging provides balanced protection with 6-12 months shelf life. The sweet spot for most food products, combining good barrier properties with excellent sustainability credentials.

faq.q1: What products work best with medium barrier?
faq.a1: Medium barrier is ideal for coffee beans, nuts, pet food, protein powders, cereals, and chocolates - products needing 6-12 month protection. It's the most popular choice for food products requiring both freshness and sustainability.
faq.q2: Is mono-PE recyclable everywhere?
faq.a2: Mono-PE (polyethylene) is one of the most widely recycled plastics globally. It's accepted in most curbside recycling programs and store drop-off recycling. We provide recycling instructions for consumers on packaging.
faq.q3: How does Bio-PE compare to regular PE?
faq.a3: Bio-PE (from sugarcane) has identical barrier and sealing properties to fossil-based PE. The difference is environmental: Bio-PE is carbon-negative in production, meaning it removes CO2 during sugarcane growth.
faq.q4: Can I use medium barrier for coffee?
faq.a4: Yes! Medium barrier works well for roasted whole beans with standard turnover. For ground coffee or specialty roasts requiring maximum freshness, consider our high barrier options with degassing valves.

cta.title: Find Your Balance
cta.description: Request samples to test medium barrier protection for your products.

allOptions.title: All Packaging Options | Complete Customization Guide
allOptions.description: Explore all sustainable packaging options: materials, pouch styles, barrier levels, closures, printing, and finishes. Complete customization guide from Achieve Pack.
allOptions.heroSubtitle: Your complete guide to sustainable packaging customization. Explore every option available—from materials to finishes, closures to printing.
allOptions.introSummary: Achieve Pack offers extensive customization options for eco-friendly flexible packaging. This comprehensive guide covers all available materials, pouch styles, barrier levels, closures, printing methods, and special features.

faq.q1: How do I choose between so many options?
faq.a1: Start with your product requirements: What are you packaging? What shelf life do you need? What sustainability goals do you have? Our team can then recommend the best combination of material, style, and features.
faq.q2: Can I mix and match options?
faq.a2: Yes! Most options can be combined. For example, you can have a compostable stand-up pouch with a zipper, matte finish, and spot UV logo. Some combinations have limitations—we'll advise during consultation.
faq.q3: Do all options have the same MOQ?
faq.a3: MOQ varies by option. Digital printing starts at 100 pieces, while plate printing typically requires 5,000+. Complex features may have higher minimums. We offer flexibility for testing.
faq.q4: How do I get samples of different options?
faq.a4: Request a sample kit with examples of different materials, finishes, and features. We can also produce custom samples of your specific design before full production.

cta.title: Build Your Custom Package
cta.description: Work with our specialists to design the perfect packaging for your product.

sizeGuide.title: Pouch Size Guide | Dimensions & Capacity Reference
sizeGuide.description: Complete pouch size guide with dimensions and capacity for stand-up pouches, flat bottom bags, and more. Find the perfect size for your product.
sizeGuide.heroSubtitle: Find the perfect pouch size for your product. Complete dimension guide with capacity references and custom size options.
sizeGuide.introSummary: Selecting the right pouch size ensures optimal product presentation and cost efficiency. Use this comprehensive guide to understand standard sizes and find the perfect fit for your product.

faq.q1: Do you have standard sizes or is everything custom?
faq.a1: We have a range of standard sizes that cover most needs with lower MOQs. Custom sizes are available for orders of 500+ pieces (digital) or 5,000+ pieces (plate printing).
faq.q2: How do I know what size fits my product?
faq.a2: Send us your product details (weight, dimensions, density) or a sample. We'll recommend sizes and can send blank pouches for you to test fill before ordering printed versions.
faq.q3: Are dimensions exact or approximate?
faq.a3: Dimensions are nominal with standard manufacturing tolerance of ±1-2mm. Critical applications should account for this variance.
faq.q4: Can I get the same product in multiple sizes?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Many brands offer the same product in different sizes (sample, regular, family size). Each size can share design elements while using size-specific artwork.

cta.title: Need Help Choosing?
cta.description: Send us your product details and we'll recommend the optimal size.

printingTypes.title: Printing Types Explained | Digital vs Plate Printing
printingTypes.description: Compare digital and plate printing for flexible packaging. Understand MOQs, costs, color options, and which method suits your needs.
printingTypes.heroSubtitle: Understand your printing options. Compare digital and plate printing to choose the right method for your packaging project.
printingTypes.introSummary: Achieve Pack offers digital printing for low MOQ orders and plate (flexographic) printing for high-volume production. Each method has distinct advantages—this guide helps you choose the right option.

faq.q1: Which printing method should I choose?
faq.a1: For orders under 5,000 pieces, digital is usually more cost-effective. For 5,000+, compare total costs including plates. If you need exact Pantone matching or special inks, plate printing is required.
faq.q2: Can I switch from digital to plate printing later?
faq.a2: Yes! Many customers start with digital for market testing, then switch to plate printing once they have consistent demand. We'll help you transition smoothly.
faq.q3: How accurate is digital color matching?
faq.a3: Digital printing simulates Pantone colors using CMYK, which is very close but not exact. For most applications it's excellent. Brand-critical colors (like specific logo colors) may benefit from plate printing.
faq.q4: What's included in plate costs?
faq.a4: Plate costs cover the creation of printing plates for each color in your design. Once made, plates can be reused for repeat orders. We store plates for 2 years at no charge.

cta.title: Get a Printing Quote
cta.description: Tell us about your project and we'll recommend the best printing option.

workflow.title: Our Workflow | From Quote to Delivery
workflow.description: Understand Achieve Pack's packaging production workflow. From initial consultation to final delivery—what to expect at every stage.
workflow.heroSubtitle: A clear, transparent process from initial inquiry to packaging delivery. Know what to expect at every stage.
workflow.introSummary: Our 5-step workflow ensures a smooth experience: Consultation → Design → Sample → Production → Delivery. Typical timeline is 8-12 weeks from inquiry to delivered packaging.

faq.q1: Can the timeline be shortened?
faq.a1: Yes, rush orders are possible with express production and air freight. Digital printing is faster than plate printing. Contact us for urgent timelines—we'll do our best to accommodate.
faq.q2: Do I need to pay upfront?
faq.a2: Typically, we require 50% deposit to start production, with the balance due before shipping. Sample orders may require full payment upfront. We accept bank transfer and major credit cards.
faq.q3: What if I need to make changes after approval?
faq.a3: Changes before production starts are usually possible. Once production begins, changes may incur additional costs or delays. We always confirm final approval before starting.
faq.q4: Do you handle customs and import duties?
faq.a4: We provide all export documentation. For DDP (Delivered Duty Paid), we handle customs clearance. For other terms (FOB, CIF), you or your freight forwarder handle import procedures.

cta.title: Start Your Project
cta.description: Ready to begin? Contact us for a free consultation and quote.

kraftHighBarrier.title: 高阻隔牛皮紙包裝袋 | 金屬鋁箔長效保鮮袋
kraftHighBarrier.description: Kraft high barrier packaging with aluminum foil for maximum protection. 12-24+ month shelf life for premium coffee, pharmaceuticals, and freeze-dried foods. FDA certified.
kraftHighBarrier.heroTitle: 極致牛皮質感，極佳避光防護
kraftHighBarrier.heroSubtitle: 天然牛皮紙外觀，搭配高厚度鋁箔阻隔層。保質期高達 12-24 個月以上，專為精品咖啡、藥品和脫水食品設計。
kraftHighBarrier.introSummary: 顧客喜愛的天然牛皮紙感，內部搭配醫藥級的高阻隔保護。為需要長效保鮮的精品產品提供兩全其美的包裝方案。

faq.q1: 高阻隔牛皮紙袋能保鮮多久？
faq.a1: 根據產品類型與存儲環境，通常能維持 12-24 個月以上的保質期。其厚鋁箔層能實現對氧氣、水分和光線的極致阻隔，阻斷一切氧化可能。
faq.q2: 高阻隔牛皮紙袋是否值得更高的成本？
faq.a2: 對於精品高值產品、需長途外銷的海運產品或對保質期要求極高的品類，這無疑是最佳選擇。長效保鮮能降低庫存損耗、擴大分銷範圍並顯著提升品牌檔次。
faq.q3: 這款包裝可以用於醫藥產品嗎？
faq.a3: 可以。我們的高阻隔牛皮紙袋完全符合醫藥級包裝要求。我們可以為受監管產品提供所有必要的合規證書和技術文件。
faq.q4: 高阻隔牛皮紙袋最適合哪種印刷方式？
faq.a4: 由於這類高阻隔材料的起訂量通常較高 (5,000-10,000 個起)，銅版印刷是最經濟高效的解決方案。我們也為小批量測試提供高端數位印刷服務。

kraftMediumBarrier.title: 中阻隔牛皮紙包裝袋 | 精品咖啡茶葉專用複合袋
kraftMediumBarrier.description: Kraft medium barrier packaging with metallized layers for coffee, nuts, and premium foods. 6-12 month shelf life. Natural aesthetic with enhanced protection. MOQ 1,000 pcs.
kraftMediumBarrier.heroTitle: 精品咖啡與食品的黃金搭檔
kraftMediumBarrier.heroSubtitle: 天然牛皮紙質感外觀，內嵌高品質鍍鋁防護層。為咖啡、堅果及手作食品提供 6-12 個月的極佳保鮮期。
kraftMediumBarrier.introSummary: 咖啡烘焙商最喜愛的牛皮紙包裝選擇。外觀呈現天然手作質感，內部具備出色的防潮防氧氣阻隔性能。可配置單向排氣閥。

faq.q1: 中阻隔與高阻隔牛皮紙袋有什麼具體差別？
faq.a1: 中阻隔採用厚度較薄的鍍鋁薄膜（VMPET/MET-PET，約 12-15µm）作為阻隔層，提供 6-12 個月的保質期；高阻隔則採用較厚的純鋁箔層（25-40µm），能為敏感產品提供 12-24 個月以上的極致避光防護。
faq.q2: 中阻隔牛皮紙袋適合包裝咖啡豆嗎？
faq.a2: 非常適合！對於目標保質期在 6-9 個月左右的烘焙咖啡豆，這是性價比最高的選擇。我們可以加裝高品質的單向排氣閥，在阻隔外界氧氣進入的同時，順暢釋放咖啡豆自身產生的二氧化碳。
faq.q3: 鍍鋁複合層可以回收嗎？
faq.a3: 牛皮紙部分是可以再生的，但鍍鋁阻隔層在某些地區可能需要送往專門的軟包裝回收設施。我們建議根據當地的廢物分類標準進行投放引導。
faq.q4: 有哪些印刷工藝可選？
faq.a4: 我們提供數位印刷（MOQ 低至 500 個起）與銅版印刷（MOQ 5,000 個起）兩種方式。牛皮紙表面吸墨性佳，非常適合呈現復古、極簡或高質感的圖案。

overview.intro: 中阻隔牛皮紙包裝採用內嵌鍍鋁阻隔層結構，有效阻隔氧氣、濕氣與光線，能為中等敏感度產品提供 6-12 個月的新鮮保鮮期。

kraftLowBarrier.title: Kraft Low Barrier Packaging | Eco-Friendly Paper Pouches
kraftLowBarrier.description: Kraft low barrier packaging for dry goods, bakery items, and short shelf life products. Natural paper appearance with basic moisture protection. MOQ 500 pcs.
kraftLowBarrier.heroSubtitle: Natural kraft paper pouches with basic protection for dry goods and short shelf life products. Eco-friendly, cost-effective, and beautifully rustic.
kraftLowBarrier.introSummary: Kraft low barrier packaging combines the natural aesthetic of kraft paper with basic moisture and oxygen protection, perfect for bakery items, dry snacks, and products with 3-6 month shelf life requirements.

faq.q1: What is the shelf life for products in kraft low barrier packaging?
faq.a1: Typically 3-6 months for dry, low-moisture products. The exact shelf life depends on the product type, storage conditions, and moisture content.
faq.q2: Can kraft low barrier packaging be used for coffee?
faq.a2: Yes, but only for short-term storage (2-3 months). For longer shelf life or premium coffee, consider our kraft medium or high barrier options with degassing valves.
faq.q3: Is this packaging food safe?
faq.a3: Yes, all our kraft packaging materials are FDA compliant and food-safe. The inner PE coating prevents direct contact between food and paper fibers.
faq.q4: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a4: For digital printing: 500-1,000 pieces. For plate printing: 5,000-10,000 pieces depending on size and design complexity.

cta.title: Get Started with Kraft Low Barrier Packaging
cta.description: Let's create sustainable kraft paper packaging that showcases your brand's natural values.

csCoffeeRoastery.title: Coffee Roastery Case Study | Bean & Bole Compostable Packaging
csCoffeeRoastery.description: How Bean & Bole Coffee Roastery switched to compostable packaging while maintaining freshness. Case study featuring Kraft+PLA pouches with degassing valves.
csCoffeeRoastery.heroTitle: Case Study: Bean & Bole Coffee Roastery
csCoffeeRoastery.heroSubtitle: How a specialty coffee roaster achieved 100% compostable packaging without compromising freshness or their small-batch approach.
csCoffeeRoastery.introSummary: Bean & Bole Coffee Roastery partnered with Achieve Pack to transition from conventional plastic to certified compostable packaging. The result: eco-friendly bags that maintain coffee freshness while reinforcing their sustainability story.

faq.q1: Can compostable packaging maintain coffee freshness?
faq.a1: Yes! With the right material combination (like Kraft + PLA with proper barrier layers), compostable packaging can maintain coffee freshness for 3-4 months. Adding a degassing valve allows CO2 release while preventing oxygen entry.
faq.q2: What was the minimum order for this project?
faq.a2: Bean & Bole started with 500 bags per SKU using digital printing. This allowed them to test the packaging with customers before committing to larger quantities.
faq.q3: Is the degassing valve also compostable?
faq.a3: We offer both options. Standard degassing valves are not compostable and need to be removed before composting—we clearly label this on the package. Fully compostable valve options are available but cost 2-3x more than standard coffee valves.

cta.title: Ready for Your Sustainable Packaging Story?
cta.description: Let's discuss how we can help your coffee brand transition to eco-friendly packaging.

csTeaBrand.introSummary: Milano Botanica partnered with Achieve Pack to create premium compostable packaging with transparent windows. The result: beautiful packaging that showcases their teas while meeting EU sustainability requirements.

faq.q1: Is the window also compostable?
faq.a1: Yes! We used NatureFlex™, a cellulose-based transparent film that is certified compostable. The entire package including the window can go into commercial composting.
faq.q2: How does this meet EU PPWR requirements?
faq.a2: The packaging is certified compostable under EN 13432, which is one pathway to EU PPWR compliance. Full documentation is provided for retailer and regulatory requirements.
faq.q3: What shelf life can tea achieve in this packaging?
faq.a3: Depending on the tea type, this packaging structure provides 9-12 months shelf life. The NatureFlex window maintains good moisture barrier while allowing product visibility.

faq.q1: How can recyclable packaging achieve high barrier?
faq.a1: Our mono-PE structure incorporates a thin EVOH layer that provides excellent oxygen barrier while maintaining recyclability in PE recycling streams. The package is store drop-off recyclable.
faq.q2: What documentation do you provide for B-Corp reporting?
faq.a2: We provide GRS certificates, material specifications, carbon footprint estimates, and recyclability statements that can be used for B-Corp sustainability reporting.

whatIsBioPE.title: Bio-PE 永續軟包裝：B2B 採購實用指南
whatIsBioPE.description: Bio-PE (生物基聚乙烯) 結合了植物基原料的碳排放優勢與傳統 PE 的可回收性。為採購及永續發展團隊提供實用指南。
whatIsBioPE.heroSubtitle: 關注碳排品牌的務實包裝方案
whatIsBioPE.heroIntro: 品牌經理與採購團隊了解生物基聚乙烯的實用指南：將經證實的可回收性與植物基碳優勢完美結合。

takeaways.title: 採購團隊的核心要點
points: Bio-PE 與常規 PE 化學結構完全一致——具備同等物理性能與回收方式
不可堆肥——其環保優勢源於原材料的可再生性與超低碳足跡
完全融入現有 PE 塑料回收渠道——無任何分揀與處理難題
認明 ASTM D6866 證書以驗證生物基含量的真實性

intro.title: 什麼是 Bio-PE？
intro.desc1: Bio-PE 是由可再生資源（通常是甘蔗提取的乙醇）而非化石石油製成的聚乙烯。關鍵核心在於：在分子結構上，它們與常規塑料完全一致。
intro.desc2: 這種分子結構的等同性意味著 Bio-PE 在以下維度與標準 PE 完全相同：
intro.density: 密度與熔融指數：完全相同的加工特性
intro.mech: 機械物理性能：同等的拉伸強度與韌性
intro.safety: 食品接觸安全：具備相同的安全合規認證
intro.note: 實際優勢：現有的 PE 吹膜與製袋設備無需任何重大調整即可直接加工 Bio-PE。

performance.title: Bio-PE 性能特徵
performance.desc: 由於 Bio-PE 與石油基 PE 在化學上完全相同，它在所有關鍵指標上均表現出完全一致的防護力。採購團隊可直接沿用現有的包裝工藝與熱封設備。
performance.barrier: ✓ 阻隔效能：提供與常規 PE 完全同等的防潮防氧氣防護
performance.seal: ✓ 熱封強度：完全相同的熱封溫度區間與封口牢固度
performance.mach: ✓ 上機適應性：可在現有的灌裝、包裝與封口線上順暢運行
performance.shelf: ✓ 產品保質期：同等的防潮保鮮力，有效保障貨架期

infrastructure.title: Bio-PE vs 可堆肥：廢棄處置差異
infrastructure.desc: 重要辨析：Bio-PE 不可堆肥。其永續價值主要體現在生命週期的起點（低碳原材料）而非終點的自然降解行為。
infrastructure.bioAdv: ✓ Bio-PE 優勢：與現有的軟包裝 PE 回收渠道 100% 兼容——無分揀困擾，無渠道污染風險。
infrastructure.compostChal: ⚠️ 可堆肥挑戰：高度依賴專業的工業堆肥基礎設施，而這類收運體系在多數地區仍受限。
infrastructure.note: 與多數可堆肥塑料不同，Bio-PE 在現有的塑料回收體系中是完全無縫融入的 drop-in 方案。

carbon.title: 降低碳足跡 contribution
carbon.desc: Bio-PE 的核心環境貢獻在於大幅度降低溫室氣體排放。甘蔗在生長階段通過光合作用捕獲大氣中的 CO₂，並將其鎖定在聚合物分子鏈中。
carbon.lcaTitle: 生命週期評估 (LCA) 效益
carbon.lcaDesc: 根據具體的評估邊界與能源結構，每生產一噸 Bio-PE 通常可避免數噸二氧化碳當量的排放 (cradle-to-gate)。
carbon.note: 原料生長階段的碳捕獲是其與石油基 PE 的根本區別，即便兩者在包裝使用與廢棄回收時表現無異。

recyclability.title: 回收再生與循環經濟
recyclability.desc: Bio-PE 是現有 PE 回收體系的最佳 drop-in 方案。自動分揀技術（近紅外光 NIR）會將其與石油基 PE 歸為同類，一同回收再造。
points: 零分揀障礙：被回收廠直接識別為標準 PE 塑料
零污染風險：完全融入常規聚乙烯回收渠道
增加植物基含量：無需以犧牲可回收性為代價
recyclability.note: 品牌宣傳機遇：將選定產品宣傳為「植物基且可回收」，免去消費者尋找專用堆肥站點的困擾。

solutions.title: Achieve Pack 綠色包裝方案
solutions.desc: Achieve Pack 推出的 Eco Digital 單一材質 (mono-PE) 軟包袋融合了：
solutions.mach: 工藝兼容：可在現有的 PE 包裝線上流暢灌裝與密封
solutions.recyc: 高回收性：作為單一材質 PE 進入常規塑料回收渠道
solutions.climate: 碳排優勢：源自甘蔗作物的植物基綠色碳源
solutions.note: 最適合：精品咖啡、休閒零食以及大健康品牌。在不改變現有包裝流程的前提下，快速實現「植物基、可回收」包裝升級。
solutions.linkText: 探索 Bio-PE 材料規格

checklist.title: 採購核對清單
checklist.desc: 在評估生物基 PE 包裝方案時，採購與永續團隊應要求供應商提供：
checklist.astmDesc: 第三方權威檢測機構出具的生物基含量比例報告
checklist.lca: 生命週期評估 (LCA) 報告
checklist.lcaDesc: 產品在生命週期各階段與常規石油基 PE 的碳排對比數據
checklist.mono: 單一材質 (Mono-PE) Recyclability 聲明
checklist.monoDesc: 確保包裝結構為單一聚乙烯以符合目標市場的可回收標準

sku.title: SKU 逐步升級策略
sku.desc: 有策略地選擇首批升級 SKU 可最大化環保與品牌效益。優先考慮：
sku.recycAccess: 回收體系完善的市場：該地區已建立軟包 PE 回收渠道
sku.carbonPriority: 主打綠色低碳定位：產品本身具備環保或天然宣傳標籤
sku.esg: 契合企業 ESG 目標：符合品牌整體的永續承諾與減碳時程
sku.note: 從小做起：先在 2-3 款主力 SKU 上試點甘蔗基 PE 包裝，再進行全品類推廣。

faq.title: 常見問答集
faq.q1: 什麼是 Bio-PE？它與傳統石油基 PE 有何不同？
faq.a1: Bio-PE (生物基聚乙烯) 在化學分子結構上與傳統 PE 完全一致，但它使用可再生的甘蔗乙醇代替化石石油作為原料。因此在密度、強度、熔融指數與食品級安全認證上均表現相同。
faq.q2: Bio-PE 包裝可以進行堆肥嗎？
faq.a2: 不行。Bio-PE 不可堆肥。它的環保價值在於使用綠色植物原料降低生產階段的碳排放，而非廢棄後的自然降解。Bio-PE 需要投放至常規 PE 塑料回收箱中。
faq.q3: 採購 Bio-PE 包裝時應索取哪些證書？
faq.a3: 您應索取：(1) ASTM D6866 生物基含量比例檢測報告，(2) 原材料甘蔗來源可追溯認證，以及 (3) 原料碳足跡生命週期 LCA 評估數據。
faq.q4: Bio-PE 能和常規塑料混在一起回收嗎？
faq.a4: 可以。Bio-PE 是常規 PE 的 drop-in 替代品。回收工廠的近紅外光分揀設備會直接將其視為普通 PE 塑料處理，完全不會造成回收污染。
faq.q5: Bio-PE 具備怎樣的減碳效應？
faq.a5: 甘蔗在生長階段大量吸收空氣中的二氧化碳。生命週期評估顯示，每生產一噸 Bio-PE 可以鎖定並淨減少數噸 CO2 當量，而石油基 PE 則會釋放碳排放。

cta.title: 準備好了解 Bio-PE 方案了嗎？
cta.desc: 對於致力於降低產品碳足跡、同時不希望犧牲包裝防護性能與回收便利性的品牌，Bio-PE 是最具務實意義的選擇。
cta.consultDesc: 預約 30 分鐘免費視訊通話，與工程師討論您的客製包裝規格
cta.sampleDesc: 申請 Bio-PE 環保樣品包（小批量 MOQ 500 個起）
cta.browseDesc: 在我們的線上商城中瀏覽多元的甘蔗基軟包裝規格
